{
  "command": "@'\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nroot = Path(r'c:\\Projects\\DodgeAI-Assignment')\n(root / 'backend' / 'prompts').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n\nreadme = '''# SAP O2C Graph Query System\n\nA full-stack graph exploration system for SAP Order-to-Cash data. The backend ingests raw O2C datasets, normalizes business entities, builds an in-memory NetworkX graph, and exposes graph/query APIs through FastAPI. The frontend renders the graph with Cytoscape.js and adds a natural-language chat workflow for guided exploration.\n\n## What This Project Does\n\n- Loads SAP O2C datasets from `sap-o2c-data`\n- Normalizes Orders, Deliveries, Invoices, Payments, Customers, Products, and Addresses\n- Builds a typed relationship graph in NetworkX\n- Exposes graph inspection and mutation APIs with FastAPI\n- Supports natural-language querying through a unified LLM query pipeline\n- Visualizes nodes, edges, metadata, and query highlights in React + Cytoscape.js\n\n## Dataset Scope\n\nThe current dataset covers the order-to-cash chain:\n\n`Customer -> Order -> Delivery -> Invoice -> Payment`\n\nSupported graph node types:\n\n- `Order`\n- `Delivery`\n- `Invoice`\n- `Payment`\n- `Customer`\n- `Product`\n- `Address`\n\nPrimary edge patterns:\n\n- `Order -> Delivery`\n- `Delivery -> Invoice`\n- `Invoice -> Payment`\n- `Order -> Customer`\n- `Order -> Product`\n- `Customer -> Address`\n\n## Architecture\n\n```text\n+-----------------------+        +---------------------------+\n| Raw SAP O2C Files     |        | Frontend (React + Vite)   |\n| CSV / JSON / JSONL    |        | Cytoscape.js + Tailwind   |\n+-----------+-----------+        +-------------+-------------+\n            |                                      |\n            v                                      |\n+-----------+-----------+                          |\n| Data Loader            |                         |\n| format handling        |                         |\n| schema normalization   |                         |\n| Pydantic validation    |                         |\n+-----------+-----------+                          |\n            |                                      |\n            v                                      v\n+-----------+-----------+        +---------------------------+\n| Graph Builder          |<------| FastAPI REST API          |\n| NetworkX MultiDiGraph  |       | graph/query endpoints     |\n| typed nodes + edges    |       | in-memory graph store     |\n+-----------+-----------+        +-------------+-------------+\n            |                                      |\n            v                                      |\n+-----------+-----------+                          |\n| Query Pipeline         |-------------------------+\n| guardrail              |\n| LLM translation        |\n| Python execution       |\n| LLM answer generation  |\n+-----------------------+\n```\n\n## Repository Layout\n\n```text\nbackend/\n  agents/              LLM client, schema context, NL query pipeline\n  logs/                LLM session markdown logs\n  prompts/             example natural-language prompts\n  routes/              FastAPI route modules\n  services/            data loading, graph building, graph store\n  tests/               backend tests\n  main.py              FastAPI entrypoint\nfrontend/\n  src/components/      graph viewer, toolbar, detail panel, chat panel\n  src/services/        API client\n  src/types/           frontend API and graph typings\nsap-o2c-data/          raw SAP O2C files\n```\n\n## Backend Setup\n\n1. Create a virtual environment.\n2. Install dependencies.\n3. Configure environment variables.\n4. Start the API server.\n\n```bash\ncd backend\npython -m venv .venv\n.venv\\Scripts\\activate\npip install -r requirements.txt\ncd ..\ncopy .env.example .env\nuvicorn backend.main:app --reload\n```\n\nBackend API will be available at `http://localhost:8000`.\n\n## Frontend Setup\n\n1. Install frontend dependencies.\n2. Start the Vite dev server.\n\n```bash\ncd frontend\nnpm install\nnpm run dev\n```\n\nFrontend will be available at `http://localhost:5173`.\n\n## Environment Variables\n\nCreate a root `.env` file from `.env.example`.\n\nCurrent LLM integration uses Gemini via `GEMINI_API_KEY`. If the key is missing, the backend automatically falls back to a rule-based mock mode for translation and answer generation.\n\nThe user request mentioned an OpenAI API key, so the template also includes `OPENAI_API_KEY` as a placeholder for future provider swaps. The current backend does not use it yet.\n\nExample:\n\n```env\nGEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key_here\nOPENAI_API_KEY=\nVITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000\n```\n\n## Running The Full App\n\nStart the backend first:\n\n```bash\nuvicorn backend.main:app --reload\n```\n\nThen start the frontend in a second terminal:\n\n```bash\ncd frontend\nnpm run dev\n```\n\n## Sample Questions\n\n- Show me all orders for customer 10100001\n- What invoices are linked to delivery 80738040?\n- Show the full chain from order 740509 to payment\n- Count all invoices in the graph\n- Which products appear in the most orders?\n- What payments are connected to invoice 90504204?\n- Show addresses for customer 10100001\n- Trace invoice 90504204 flow\n- What is the weather in Mumbai today?\n  This should be rejected by the guardrail.\n\nMore examples live in `backend/prompts/example_prompts.md`.\n\n## API Highlights\n\n- `GET /api/graph`\n- `GET /api/graph/stats`\n- `GET /api/node/{node_id}`\n- `GET /api/node/{node_id}/subgraph?depth=2`\n- `POST /api/graph/node`\n- `POST /api/graph/edge`\n- `DELETE /api/graph/reset`\n- `GET /api/graph/export`\n- `POST /api/query`\n\n## Screenshots\n\nAdd screenshots here as the UI is finalized.\n\n- `docs/screenshots/graph-overview.png` - full graph view placeholder\n- `docs/screenshots/node-detail.png` - node metadata panel placeholder\n- `docs/screenshots/chat-query.png` - natural-language query workflow placeholder\n- `docs/screenshots/subgraph-highlight.png` - graph highlight/subgraph placeholder\n\n## Logging\n\nEvery query appends a markdown entry to `backend/logs/llm_sessions.md`.\n\nThe log captures:\n\n- guardrail decisions\n- translator prompt/response\n- translation refinement passed to execution\n- answer-generation prompt/response\n- fallback notes when mock mode is used\n\n## Integration Notes\n\nThis repository has been verified locally with:\n\n- backend graph tests via `pytest`\n- frontend production build via `npm run build`\n- API smoke checks for graph load, node detail, query, add node, add edge, export, and reset\n\nVisual browser interactions still depend on opening the running app locally, but the underlying API flow and frontend build path have been validated.\n'''\n(root / 'README.md').write_text(readme, encoding='utf-8')\n\nenv_example = '''# Root environment variables for local development\n# Gemini powers the current LLM query pipeline.\nGEMINI_API_KEY=\n\n# Reserved for future provider swaps; not used by the current backend.\nOPENAI_API_KEY=\n\n# Frontend API target.\nVITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000\n'''\n(root / '.env.example').write_text(env_example, encoding='utf-8')\n\nexample_prompts = '''# Example Prompts\n\nUse these prompts in the chat panel or against `POST /api/query`.\n\n## Core graph exploration\n\n1. Show me all orders for customer 10100001\n2. What invoices are linked to delivery 80738040?\n3. Total payment amount for order 740509\n4. Which products were in the most orders?\n5. Show the full chain from order 740509 to payment\n6. List all overdue invoices\n7. Count all deliveries connected to invoice 90504204\n8. Show all products linked to order 740509\n9. Which customers have the most invoices?\n10. Find the address connected to customer 10100001\n11. Trace invoice 90504204 flow\n12. Show payments linked to invoice 90504204\n13. Count all orders in the graph\n14. Show deliveries for customer 10100001\n15. Find node 80738040\n\n## Guardrail rejection example\n\n16. What is the capital of France?\n\nExpected behavior: the system should reject this question because it is not related to the SAP O2C dataset.\n\n## Notes\n\n- If `GEMINI_API_KEY` is not configured, the backend will answer in mock mode.\n- IDs can be asked directly when known, for example `order 740509` or `invoice 90504204`.\n- Questions outside orders, deliveries, invoices, payments, customers, products, and addresses should be rejected.\n'''\n(root / 'backend' / 'prompts' / 'example_prompts.md').write_text(example_prompts, encoding='utf-8')\n'@ | python -",
  "workdir": "c:\\Projects\\DodgeAI-Assignment",
  "timeout_ms": 20000,
  "login": false
}

from __future__ import annotations

from collections import Counter
from typing import Any

import networkx as nx

from .data_loader import NormalizedData

class GraphBuilder:
    def __init__(self, data: NormalizedData) -> None:
        self.data = data
        self.graph = nx.MultiDiGraph()
        self._build()

    @staticmethod
    def _node_key(entity_type: str, entity_id: str) -> str:
        return f"{entity_type}:{entity_id}"

    def _build(self) -> None:
        for customer in self.data.customers:
            self._add_entity_node("customer", customer)

Output:
# Example Prompts

Use these prompts in the chat panel or against `POST /api/query`.

## Core graph exploration

1. Show me all orders for customer 10100001
2. What invoices are linked to delivery 80738040
3. Total payment amount for order 740509
4. Which products were in the most orders
5. Show the full chain from order 740509 to payment
6. List all overdue invoices
7. Count all deliveries connected to invoice 90504204
8. Show all products linked to order 740509
9. Which customers have the most invoices
10. Find the address connected to customer 10100001
11. Trace invoice 90504204 flow
12. Show payments linked to invoice 90504204
13. Count all orders in the graph
14. Show deliveries for customer 10100001
15. Find node 80738040

## Guardrail rejection example

16. What is the capital of France

Expected behavior: the system should reject this question because it is not related to the SAP O2C dataset.

## Notes

- If `GEMINI_API_KEY` is not configured, the backend will answer in mock mode.
- IDs can be asked directly when known, for example `order 740509` or `invoice 90504204`.
- Questions outside orders, deliveries, invoices, payments, customers, products, and addresses should be rejected.
```

Output:
# SAP O2C Graph Query System

A full-stack graph exploration system for SAP Order-to-Cash data. The backend ingests raw O2C datasets, normalizes business entities, builds an in-memory NetworkX graph, and exposes graph/query APIs through FastAPI. The frontend renders the graph with Cytoscape.js and adds a natural-language chat workflow for guided exploration.

## What This Project Does

- Loads SAP O2C datasets from `sap-o2c-data`
- Normalizes Orders, Deliveries, Invoices, Payments, Customers, Products, and Addresses
- Builds a typed relationship graph in NetworkX
- Exposes graph inspection and mutation APIs with FastAPI
- Supports natural-language querying through a unified LLM query pipeline
- Visualizes nodes, edges, metadata, and query highlights in React + Cytoscape.js

## Dataset Scope

The current dataset covers the order-to-cash chain:

`Customer -> Order -> Delivery -> Invoice -> Payment`

Supported graph node types:

- `Order`
... [truncated 187 additional lines]
```

Exit code: 0

Output:
# SAP O2C Graph Query System

A full-stack graph exploration system for SAP Order-to-Cash data. The backend ingests raw O2C datasets, normalizes business entities, builds an in-memory NetworkX graph, and exposes graph/query APIs through FastAPI. The frontend renders the graph with Cytoscape.js and adds a natural-language chat workflow for guided exploration.

## What This Project Does

- Loads SAP O2C datasets from `sap-o2c-data`
- Normalizes Orders, Deliveries, Invoices, Payments, Customers, Products, and Addresses
- Builds a typed relationship graph in NetworkX
- Exposes graph inspection and mutation APIs with FastAPI
- Supports natural-language querying through a unified LLM query pipeline
- Visualizes nodes, edges, metadata, and query highlights in React + Cytoscape.js

## Dataset Scope

The current dataset covers the order-to-cash chain:

`Customer -> Order -> Delivery -> Invoice -> Payment`

### Assistant
Final integration is done and committed in `51e9ec4` as `feat: integration testing, documentation, and polish`.

I updated [README.md](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/README.md), added [backend/prompts/example_prompts.md](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/backend/prompts/example_prompts.md), cleaned up [.env.example](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/.env.example), and patched [backend/agents/query_pipeline.py](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/backend/agents/query_pipeline.py) so the LLM log now records the full prompt -> response -> refinement flow. I also verified [backend/logs/llm_sessions.md](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/backend/logs/llm_sessions.md) is being written with guardrail, translation, refinement, and answer stages.

What I verified locally:
- Backend served successfully with `uvicorn backend.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000`
- Frontend served successfully on `http://127.0.0.1:5173`
- `GET /api/graph/stats`, `GET /api/graph`, `GET /api/node/{id}`, `GET /api/node/{id}/subgraph`
- `POST /api/query` for both valid and rejected questions
- `POST /api/graph/node`, `POST /api/graph/edge`, `GET /api/graph/export`, `DELETE /api/graph/reset`
- `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_graph.py -q` -> `2 passed`
- `npm run build` -> passed

One real polish fix I made:
- Added explicit `translation-refinement` logging so the execution-ready structured query is captured in the LLM session log.

`git log --oneline`:
```text

### Assistant
I’ve isolated the layout issue: a few panels are using content-driven heights and the graph canvas is still reserving a mobile-friendly `70vh`, which pushes the page into scroll. I’m converting the shell to a fixed `100vh` workspace with internal panel scrolling only where it’s actually needed.

The patch tool hit the same Windows sandbox issue we’ve seen before, so I’m applying the same changes directly through the shell instead of leaving you blocked. The edits are still limited to the layout files only.

The UI is now constrained to a single visible screen with no page scrolling.

I updated [App.tsx](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/frontend/src/App.tsx), [GraphViewer.tsx](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/frontend/src/components/GraphViewer.tsx), [NodeDetail.tsx](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/frontend/src/components/NodeDetail.tsx), and [ChatPanel.tsx](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/frontend/src/components/ChatPanel.tsx) so the app uses a fixed `h-screen` shell, the graph fills the remaining center area, and only the detail/chat content areas scroll internally when needed.

### Assistant
The reason is likely this line in [llm_client.py](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/backend/agents/llm_client.py):

```python
os.environ.setdefault(key.strip(), value.strip())
```

`setdefault()` only fills the value if that env var is not already present. So if `GEMINI_API_KEY` already exists in your shell as an empty value, the `.env` value will be ignored and the app stays in mock mode.

Check in PowerShell:

```powershell
echo $env:GEMINI_API_KEY
```

If it prints nothing, set it explicitly in the current terminal:

```powershell
$env:GEMINI_API_KEY="your_actual_gemini_api_key"
uvicorn backend.main:app --reload
```

Also make sure your root `.env` is exactly here:

```powershell
C:\Projects\DodgeAI-Assignment\.env
```

and contains:

```env
GEMINI_API_KEY=your_actual_gemini_api_key
```

If you want, I can fix the code so `.env` reliably overrides empty shell values.

### User
Yes, It should read .env in root folder

The issue is confirmed: the current loader reads the root `.env`, but it won’t override an already-present empty `GEMINI_API_KEY` in the process environment. I’m switching it to a proper root `.env` load with override behavior so your key wins consistently.

{

optional dependency in mock mode\n    genai = None\n    types = None\n\n\ndef _load_env() -> None:\n    if ENV_PATH.exists():\n        load_dotenv(ENV_PATH, override=True)\n\n\ndef get_gemini_api_key() -> str:\n    _load_env()\n    return os.getenv(\"GEMINI_API_KEY\", \"\").strip()\n\n\ndef is_gemini_available() -> bool:\n    return bool(get_gemini_api_key()) and genai is not None and types is not None\n\n\nasync def call_gemini(prompt: str, system_instruction: str) -> str:\n    api_key = get_gemini_api_key()\n    if not api_key:\n        LOGGER.warning(\"No Gemini API key found, using mock mode\")\n        raise RuntimeError(\"No Gemini API key found, using mock mode\")\n    if genai is None or types is None:\n        raise RuntimeError(\"google-genai is not installed\")\n\n    client = genai.Client(api_key=api_key)\n\n    async def _invoke() -> str:\n        def _sync_call() -> str:\n            response = client.models.generate_content(\n                model=MODEL_NAME,\n                contents=prompt,\n                config=types.GenerateContentConfig(\n                    system_instruction=system_instruction,\n                    temperature=0.1,\n                ),\n            )\n            text = getattr(response, \"text\", None)\n            if not text or not str(text).strip():\n                raise RuntimeError(\"Gemini returned an empty response\")\n            return str(text).strip()\n\n        return await asyncio.to_thread(_sync_call)\n\n    last_error: Exception | None = None\n    for attempt in range(2):\n        try:\n            return await asyncio.wait_for(_invoke(), timeout=30)\n        except Exception as exc:  # pragma: no cover - network dependent\n            last_error = exc\n            LOGGER.warning(\"Gemini call attempt %s failed: %s\", attempt + 1, exc)\n            await asyncio.sleep(1 + attempt)\n    raise RuntimeError(f\"Gemini call failed: {last_error}\")\n''', encoding='utf-8')\n'@ | python -",

### Assistant
The loader is updated now. After one backend restart, it should read `C:\Projects\DodgeAI-Assignment\.env` directly and honor the key from that file even if your shell had an empty value before.

Updated [llm_client.py](/c:/Projects/DodgeAI-Assignment/backend/agents/llm_client.py) so it now loads the root `.env` with `python-dotenv` and `override=True`.

What to do now:

1. Make sure this file exists:
```text
C:\Projects\DodgeAI-Assignment\.env
```

2. Put your key in it:
```env
GEMINI_API_KEY=your_actual_gemini_api_key
OPENAI_API_KEY=
VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000
```

3. Restart the backend:
```powershell
cd C:\Projects\DodgeAI-Assignment
backend\.venv\Scripts\activate
uvicorn backend.main:app --reload
```

If you still want, I can also add a startup log line that confirms whether `.env` was found, without printing the secret itself.

### Assistant
Found the actual issue.

Your root `.env` is correct and is being read:
- `.env` exists at `C:\Projects\DodgeAI-Assignment\.env`
- `GEMINI_API_KEY` is loading correctly
- Python sees the key with length `39`

The real failure is this:
- `google-genai` is not installed in your active backend virtualenv
- `from google import genai` fails
- so `is_gemini_available()` returns `False`
- then the app falls back to mock mode

I verified:
- `pip show google-genai` -> package not found
- `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'google'`

Run this in your backend env:

```powershell
cd C:\Projects\DodgeAI-Assignment
backend\.venv\Scripts\activate
pip install -r backend\requirements.txt
```

Or just install the missing package directly:

```powershell
pip install google-genai
```

Then restart backend:

```powershell
uvicorn backend.main:app --reload
```

If you want to confirm before restarting, run:

```powershell
python -c "from google import genai; print('Gemini import OK')"
```

If that prints `Gemini import OK`, the warning should disappear on the next query.

### Assistant
I found the likely reason: query highlights can get visually swallowed by the graph’s existing `faded`/active classes, and the returned IDs mix raw entity IDs with prefixed node keys. I’m tightening the highlight logic so it normalizes IDs, clears conflicting styles, and visibly focuses the matched nodes.

shell_command

- normalizes returned node IDs before matching them
- clears conflicting `faded`/active styles before applying query highlights
- makes highlighted nodes much more visible and auto-focuses them in the graph

{ ChatPanel } from \"./components/ChatPanel\";\nimport { GraphViewer } from \"./components/GraphViewer\";\nimport { NodeDetail } from \"./components/NodeDetail\";\nimport { Toolbar } from \"./components/Toolbar\";\nimport type { NodeSummary } from \"./types/api\";\n\nexport default function App() {\n  const [selectedNode, setSelectedNode] = useState<NodeSummary | null>(null);\n  const [refreshToken, setRefreshToken] = useState(0);\n  const [expandTarget, setExpandTarget] = useState<{ nodeId: string; depth: number } | null>(null);\n  const [highlightedNodes, setHighlightedNodes] = useState<string[]>([]);\n  const [statusMessage, setStatusMessage] = useState(\"Graph loaded from the backend API.\");\n  const [isConsoleOpen, setIsConsoleOpen] = useState(true);\n\n  const viewerKey = useMemo(\n    () => `${refreshToken}:${expandTarget?.nodeId ?? \"full\"}:${expandTarget?.depth ?? 0}`,\n    [expandTarget?.depth, expandTarget?.nodeId, refreshToken],\n  );\n\n  const handleGraphChanged = (message: string) => {\n    setStatusMessage(message);\n    setRefreshToken((current) => current + 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleExpand = (nodeId: string, depth: number) => {\n    setStatusMessage(`Expanded graph around ${nodeId} with depth ${depth}.`);\n    setExpandTarget({ nodeId, depth });\n    setHighlightedNodes([nodeId]);\n  };\n\n  const handleShowFullGraph = () => {\n    setStatusMessage(\"Showing the full graph.\");\n    setExpandTarget(null);\n    setRefreshToken((current) => current + 1);\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen overflow-hidden bg-[#f7f7f5] text-slate-900\">\n      <header className=\"flex h-20 items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-200 bg-white px-7\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n          <button\n            className=\"flex size-11 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-50\"\n            onClick={() => setIsConsoleOpen((current) => !current)}\n            type=\"button\"\n          >\n            <span className=\"text-xl\">☰</span>\n          </button>\n          <div className=\"h-8 w-px bg-slate-200\" />\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-[18px]\">\n            <span className=\"text-slate-400\">Mapping</span>\n            <span className=\"text-slate-300\">/</span>\n            <span className=\"font-semibold text-slate-950\">Order to Cash</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </header>\n\n      <div className=\"flex h-[calc(100vh-5rem)] overflow-hidden p-4\">\n        <section className=\"relative min-w-0 flex-1 overflow-hidden rounded-[22px] border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm\">\n          <div className=\"absolute left-4 top-4 z-20 flex items-center gap-3\">\n            <button\n              className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-5 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 shadow-sm transition hover:bg-slate-50\"\n              onClick={() => setIsConsoleOpen((current) => !current)}\n              type=\"button\"\n            >\n              {isConsoleOpen ? \"Minimize\" : \"Open Console\"}\n            </button>\n            <button\n              className=\"rounded-2xl bg-slate-950 px-5 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm transition hover:bg-slate-800\"\n              onClick={handleShowFullGraph}\n              type=\"button\"\n            >\n              Show Full Graph\n            </button>\n          </div>\n\n          <div\n            className={`absolute left-4 top-20 z-20 h-[calc(100%-6rem)] overflow-hidden rounded-[24px] border border-slate-200 bg-white/95 shadow-xl backdrop-blur transition-all duration-300 ${\n              isConsoleOpen ? \"w-full max-w-[360px] opacity-100\" : \"pointer-events-none w-0 opacity-0\"\n            }`}\n          >\n            <div className=\"flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col overflow-hidden p-4\">\n              <div className=\"mb-4 flex items-center justify-between\">\n                <div>\n                  <p className=\"text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.24em] text-slate-400\">Console</p>\n                  <h1 className=\"mt-1 text-2xl font-semibold text-slate-950\">Order to Cash</h1>\n                </div>\n                <button\n                  className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-600 transition hover:bg-slate-50\"\n                  onClick={() => setIsConsoleOpen(false)}\n                  type=\"button\"\n                >\n                  Hide\n                </button>\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"shrink-0\">\n                <Toolbar onGraphChanged={handleGraphChanged} onShowFullGraph={handleShowFullGraph} />\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"mt-4 min-h-0 flex-1\">\n                <NodeDetail\n                  key={selectedNode?.nodeKey ?? \"empty\"}\n                  onExpand={handleExpand}\n                  selectedNode={selectedNode}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div className=\"mt-4 shrink-0 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-600\">\n                {statusMessage}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <GraphViewer\n            key={viewerKey}\n            expandTarget={expandTarget}\n            highlightedNodes={highlightedNodes}\n            onClearHighlights={() => setHighlightedNodes([])}\n            onNodeSelect={setSelectedNode}\n            refreshToken={refreshToken}\n          />\n        </section>\n\n        <ChatPanel highlightedNodes={highlightedNodes} onHighlightNodes={setHighlightedNodes} />\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n''', encoding='utf-8')\n\n(root / 'components' / 'ChatPanel.tsx').write_text('''import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\n\nimport { queryGraph } from \"../services/api\";\nimport type { ChatMessage } from \"../types/api\";\n\ninterface ChatPanelProps {\n  highlightedNodes: string[];\n  onHighlightNodes: (nodeIds: string[]) => void;\n}\n\nfunction createMessageId() {\n  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\n}\n\nexport function ChatPanel({ highlightedNodes, onHighlightNodes }: ChatPanelProps) {\n  const [input, setInput] = useState(\"\");\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([\n    {\n      id: createMessageId(),\n      role: \"assistant\",\n      text: \"Hi! I can help you analyze the Order to Cash process.\",\n    },\n  ]);\n  const [isThinking, setIsThinking] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {\n      if (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n        setInput(\"\");\n      }\n    };\n\n    window.addEventListener(\"keydown\", handleKeyDown);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener(\"keydown\", handleKeyDown);\n  }, []);\n\n  const activeHighlightCount = useMemo(() => highlightedNodes.length, [highlightedNodes.length]);\n\n  const handleSend = async () => {\n    const question = input.trim();\n    if (!question || isThinking) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const userMessage: ChatMessage = {\n      id: createMessageId(),\n      role: \"user\",\n      text: question,\n    };\n\n    setMessages((current) => [...current, userMessage]);\n    setInput(\"\");\n    setIsThinking(true);\n\n    try {\n      const response = await queryGraph(question);\n      const rejected = response.answer.includes(\"designed to answer questions related to the dataset only\");\n      const assistantMessage: ChatMessage = {\n        id: createMessageId(),\n        role: \"assistant\",\n        text: response.answer,\n        relevantNodeIds: response.relevant_node_ids,\n        rawData: response.raw_data,\n        rejected,\n      };\n      setMessages((current) => [...current, assistantMessage]);\n      onHighlightNodes(response.relevant_node_ids ?? []);\n    } catch (error) {\n      const message: ChatMessage = {\n        id: createMessageId(),\n        role: \"assistant\",\n        text: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Query failed. Please try again.\",\n      };\n      setMessages((current) => [...current, message]);\n      onHighlightNodes([]);\n    } finally {\n      setIsThinking(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <aside className=\"ml-4 flex w-[430px] shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-[22px] border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm\">\n      <div className=\"flex h-full min-h-0 w-full flex-col\">\n        <div className=\"border-b border-slate-200 px-5 py-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-[18px] font-semibold text-slate-950\">Chat with Graph</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-slate-500\">Order to Cash</p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"border-b border-slate-100 px-5 py-5\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-start gap-4\">\n            <div className=\"flex size-12 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-950 text-lg font-semibold text-white\">\n              D\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <h3 className=\"text-[18px] font-semibold text-slate-950\">Dodge AI</h3>\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">Graph Agent</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 space-y-4 overflow-auto px-5 py-5\">\n          {messages.map((message) => (\n            <div key={message.id} className=\"space-y-2\">\n              <div className={`text-[15px] leading-8 ${message.rejected ? \"text-amber-700\" : \"text-slate-900\"}`}>\n                {message.text}\n              </div>\n              {message.relevantNodeIds && message.relevantNodeIds.length > 0 ? (\n                <div className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">\n                  Highlighted {message.relevantNodeIds.length} node(s) in the graph.\n                </div>\n              ) : null}\n            </div>\n          ))}\n          {isThinking ? <div className=\"text-[15px] text-slate-500\">Thinking through the graph...</div> : null}\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"border-t border-slate-200 p-5\">\n          <div className=\"mb-3 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-emerald-100 bg-emerald-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-emerald-700\">\n            <span className=\"size-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500\" />\n            Dodge AI is awaiting instructions\n            <span className=\"ml-auto text-slate-400\">{activeHighlightCount > 0 ? `${activeHighlightCount} highlighted` : \"Ready\"}</span>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm\">\n            <textarea\n              className=\"h-28 w-full resize-none border-0 bg-transparent text-[15px] text-slate-900 outline-none placeholder:text-slate-400\"\n              onChange={(event) => setInput(event.target.value)}\n              onKeyDown={(event) => {\n                if (event.key === \"Enter\" && !event.shiftKey) {\n                  event.preventDefault();\n                  void handleSend();\n                }\n                if (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n                  setInput(\"\");\n                }\n              }}\n              placeholder=\"Analyze anything\"\n              value={input}\n            />\n            <div className=\"mt-4 flex items-center justify-end\">\n              <button\n                className=\"rounded-2xl bg-slate-500 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-600 disabled:opacity-60\"\n                disabled={isThinking || !input.trim()}\n                onClick={() => void handleSend()}\n                type=\"button\"\n              >\n                Send\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </aside>\n  );\n}\n''', encoding='utf-8')\n\n(root / 'components' / 'Toolbar.tsx').write_text('''import { useState } from \"react\";\n\nimport { addGraphEdge, addGraphNode, exportGraphJson, resetGraph } from \"../services/api\";\n\ninterface ToolbarProps {\n  onGraphChanged: (message: string) => void;\n  onShowFullGraph: () => void;\n}\n\ntype ModalMode = \"node\" | \"edge\" | null;\n\nconst inputClassName =\n  \"w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 outline-none transition focus:border-sky-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-100\";\n\nexport function Toolbar({ onGraphChanged, onShowFullGraph }: ToolbarProps) {\n  const [modalMode, setModalMode] = useState<ModalMode>(null);\n  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [nodeForm, setNodeForm] = useState({\n    id: \"\",\n    type: \"Product\",\n    metadata: '{\\n  \"name\": \"Sample Node\"\\n}',\n  });\n  const [edgeForm, setEdgeForm] = useState({\n    source: \"\",\n    target: \"\",\n    relationship: \"order_to_product\",\n  });\n\n  const closeModal = () => {\n    setError(null);\n    setModalMode(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleAddNode = async () => {\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await addGraphNode({\n        id: nodeForm.id,\n        type: nodeForm.type,\n        metadata: JSON.parse(nodeForm.metadata),\n      });\n      closeModal();\n      onGraphChanged(`Added ${nodeForm.type} node ${nodeForm.id}.`);\n    } catch (submitError) {\n      setError(submitError instanceof Error ? submitError.message : \"Unable to add node\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAddEdge = async () => {\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await addGraphEdge(edgeForm);\n      closeModal();\n      onGraphChanged(`Added edge ${edgeForm.relationship} from ${edgeForm.source} to ${edgeForm.target}.`);\n    } catch (submitError) {\n      setError(submitError instanceof Error ? submitError.message : \"Unable to add edge\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleReset = async () => {\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await resetGraph();\n      onShowFullGraph();\n      onGraphChanged(\"Graph reset from backend source data.\");\n    } catch (resetError) {\n      setError(resetError instanceof Error ? resetError.message : \"Unable to reset graph\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleExport = async () => {\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const blob = await exportGraphJson();\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const anchor = document.createElement(\"a\");\n      anchor.href = url;\n      anchor.download = \"sap-o2c-graph.json\";\n      anchor.click();\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n      onGraphChanged(\"Exported graph JSON.\");\n    } catch (exportError) {\n      setError(exportError instanceof Error ? exportError.message : \"Unable to export graph\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <section className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-4\">\n      <div className=\"mb-4\">\n        <p className=\"text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-slate-400\">Controls</p>\n        <h2 className=\"mt-1 text-lg font-semibold text-slate-950\">Graph Toolbar</h2>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3\">\n        <button className=\"rounded-xl bg-slate-950 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-800\" onClick={() => setModalMode(\"node\")} type=\"button\">Add Node</button>\n        <button className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-50\" onClick={() => setModalMode(\"edge\")} type=\"button\">Add Edge</button>\n        <button className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-60\" disabled={submitting} onClick={() => void handleReset()} type=\"button\">Reset Graph</button>\n        <button className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-60\" disabled={submitting} onClick={() => void handleExport()} type=\"button\">Export JSON</button>\n      </div>\n\n      {error ? <div className=\"mt-4 rounded-xl border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-rose-700\">{error}</div> : null}\n\n      {modalMode ? (\n        <div className=\"mt-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4\">\n          <div className=\"mb-3 flex items-center justify-between\">\n            <h3 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900\">{modalMode === \"node\" ? \"Create Node\" : \"Create Edge\"}</h3>\n            <button className=\"text-sm text-slate-500 transition hover:text-slate-900\" onClick={closeModal} type=\"button\">Close</button>\n          </div>\n\n          {modalMode === \"node\" ? (\n            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n              <input className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setNodeForm((current) => ({ ...current, id: event.target.value }))} placeholder=\"Node ID\" value={nodeForm.id} />\n              <select className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setNodeForm((current) => ({ ...current, type: event.target.value }))} value={nodeForm.type}>\n                {[\"Order\", \"Delivery\", \"Invoice\", \"Payment\", \"Customer\", \"Product\", \"Address\"].map((type) => (\n                  <option key={type} value={type}>{type}</option>\n                ))}\n              </select>\n              <textarea className={`${inputClassName} min-h-32`} onChange={(event) => setNodeForm((current) => ({ ...current, metadata: event.target.value }))} value={nodeForm.metadata} />\n              <button className=\"w-full rounded-xl bg-slate-950 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-800 disabled:opacity-60\" disabled={submitting || !nodeForm.id.trim()} onClick={() => void handleAddNode()} type=\"button\">{submitting ? \"Saving...\" : \"Create Node\"}</button>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n              <input className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setEdgeForm((current) => ({ ...current, source: event.target.value }))} placeholder=\"Source ID\" value={edgeForm.source} />\n              <input className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setEdgeForm((current) => ({ ...current, target: event.target.value }))} placeholder=\"Target ID\" value={edgeForm.target} />\n              <select className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setEdgeForm((current) => ({ ...current, relationship: event.target.value }))} value={edgeForm.relationship}>\n                {[\"order_to_delivery\", \"delivery_to_invoice\", \"invoice_to_payment\", \"order_to_customer\", \"order_to_product\", \"customer_to_address\"].map((relationship) => (\n                  <option key={relationship} value={relationship}>{relationship}</option>\n                ))}\n              </select>\n              <button className=\"w-full rounded-xl bg-slate-950 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-800 disabled:opacity-60\" disabled={submitting || !edgeForm.source.trim() || !edgeForm.target.trim()} onClick={() => void handleAddEdge()} type=\"button\">{submitting ? \"Saving...\" : \"Create Edge\"}</button>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : null}\n    </section>\n  );\n}\n''', encoding='utf-8')\n\n(root / 'components' / 'NodeDetail.tsx').write_text('''import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n\nimport { fetchNode } from \"../services/api\";\nimport type { CytoscapeNodeData, NodeSummary } from \"../types/api\";\n\ninterface NodeDetailProps {\n  onExpand: (nodeId: string, depth: number) => void;\n  selectedNode: NodeSummary | null;\n}\n\ninterface DetailState {\n  neighbors: CytoscapeNodeData[];\n  node: CytoscapeNodeData;\n}\n\nexport function NodeDetail({ onExpand, selectedNode }: NodeDetailProps) {\n  const [detail, setDetail] = useState<DetailState | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let isActive = true;\n\n    async function loadNode() {\n      if (!selectedNode) {\n        setDetail(null);\n        setError(null);\n        setLoading(false);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      setLoading(true);\n      setError(null);\n\n      try {\n        const response = await fetchNode(selectedNode.entityId);\n        if (isActive) {\n          setDetail(response);\n        }\n      } catch (loadError) {\n        if (isActive) {\n          setError(loadError instanceof Error ? loadError.message : \"Unable to load node details\");\n        }\n      } finally {\n        if (isActive) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    void loadNode();\n\n    return () => {\n      isActive = false;\n    };\n  }, [selectedNode]);\n\n  return (\n    <section className=\"flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4\">\n      <div className=\"mb-4\">\n        <p className=\"text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-slate-400\">Inspector</p>\n        <h2 className=\"mt-1 text-lg font-semibold text-slate-950\">Node Detail</h2>\n      </div>\n\n      {!selectedNode ? <p className=\"text-sm leading-6 text-slate-500\">Click a node in the graph to inspect its metadata and connected entities.</p> : null}\n      {loading ? <p className=\"text-sm text-sky-600\">Loading node details...</p> : null}\n      {error ? <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-rose-700\">{error}</div> : null}\n\n      {detail ? (\n        <div className=\"min-h-0 space-y-4 overflow-hidden\">\n          <div className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-4\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between gap-4\">\n              <div>\n                <p className=\"text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400\">{detail.node.entity_type}</p>\n                <h3 className=\"mt-1 text-lg font-semibold text-slate-950\">{detail.node.label ?? detail.node.entity_id}</h3>\n                <p className=\"mt-1 text-xs text-slate-500\">Node key: {detail.node.node_key ?? detail.node.id}</p>\n              </div>\n              <button className=\"rounded-xl bg-slate-950 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-800\" onClick={() => onExpand(detail.node.entity_id, 2)} type=\"button\">Expand</button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-4\">\n            <h4 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900\">Metadata</h4>\n            <div className=\"max-h-48 space-y-2 overflow-auto pr-2 scrollbar-thin\">\n              {Object.entries(detail.node.metadata ?? {}).map(([key, value]) => (\n                <div key={key} className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm\">\n                  <div className=\"font-medium text-slate-700\">{key}</div>\n                  <div className=\"mt-1 break-words text-slate-500\">{typeof value === \"object\" ? JSON.stringify(value) : String(value)}</div>\n                </div>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-4\">\n            <h4 className=\"mb-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900\">Connected Nodes</h4>\n            <div className=\"max-h-40 space-y-2 overflow-auto pr-2 scrollbar-thin\">\n              {detail.neighbors.map((neighbor) => (\n                <div key={neighbor.node_key ?? neighbor.id} className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2\">\n                  <div className=\"text-sm font-medium text-slate-800\">{neighbor.label ?? neighbor.entity_id}</div>\n                  <div className=\"text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-slate-400\">{neighbor.entity_type}</div>\n                </div>\n              ))}\n              {!detail.neighbors.length ? <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">No connected nodes found.</p> : null}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      ) : null}\n    </section>\n  );\n}\n''', encoding='utf-8')\n\n(root / 'components' / 'GraphViewer.tsx').write_text('''import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\n\nimport cytoscape, { type Core, type ElementDefinition } from \"cytoscape\";\nimport coseBilkent from \"cytoscape-cose-bilkent\";\n\nimport { fetchGraph, fetchGraphStats, fetchSubgraph } from \"../services/api\";\nimport type { GraphPayload, GraphStats, NodeSummary } from \"../types/api\";\nimport { DEFAULT_NODE_COLOR, NODE_TYPE_COLORS } from \"../types/graph\";\n\ncytoscape.use(coseBilkent);\n\ninterface GraphViewerProps {\n  expandTarget: { nodeId: string; depth: number } | null;\n  highlightedNodes: string[];\n  onClearHighlights: () => void;\n  onNodeSelect: (node: NodeSummary | null) => void;\n  refreshToken: number;\n}\n\nfunction toElements(payload: GraphPayload): ElementDefinition[] {\n  const nodes = payload.nodes.map((node) => ({ data: node.data }));\n  const edges = payload.edges.map((edge) => ({ data: edge.data }));\n  return [...nodes, ...edges];\n}\n\nfunction normalizeHighlightId(value: string): string {\n  const trimmed = value.trim();\n  const parts = trimmed.split(\":\");\n  return parts[parts.length - 1] ?? trimmed;\n}\n\nexport function GraphViewer({\n  expandTarget,\n  highlightedNodes,\n  onClearHighlights,\n  onNodeSelect,\n  refreshToken,\n}: GraphViewerProps) {\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);\n  const cyRef = useRef<Core | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<GraphStats | null>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!containerRef.current || cyRef.current) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const cy = cytoscape({\n      container: containerRef.current,\n      elements: [],\n      layout: {\n        name: \"cose-bilkent\",\n        fit: true,\n        padding: 120,\n        nodeRepulsion: 240000,\n        idealEdgeLength: 180,\n        edgeElasticity: 0.12,\n        nestingFactor: 0.9,\n        gravity: 0.12,\n        tile: false,\n      } as cytoscape.LayoutOptions,\n      style: [\n        {\n          selector: \"node\",\n          style: {\n            \"background-color\": (element) => NODE_TYPE_COLORS[element.data(\"entity_type\")] ?? DEFAULT_NODE_COLOR,\n            label: \"\",\n            width: \"8\",\n            height: \"8\",\n            opacity: 0.95,\n            \"border-width\": 0,\n            \"overlay-opacity\": 0,\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \"edge\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"1.8px\",\n            \"line-color\": \"#8fd0ff\",\n            \"target-arrow-color\": \"#8fd0ff\",\n            \"target-arrow-shape\": \"none\",\n            \"curve-style\": \"straight\",\n            opacity: 0.45,\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".active-node\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"14\",\n            height: \"14\",\n            \"background-color\": \"#111827\",\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".active-edge\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"2.8px\",\n            opacity: 0.9,\n            \"line-color\": \"#38bdf8\",\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".query-highlight\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"16\",\n            height: \"16\",\n            \"background-color\": \"#ef4444\",\n            \"underlay-color\": \"#fecaca\",\n            \"underlay-padding\": \"7px\",\n            \"underlay-opacity\": 0.95,\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".query-connected\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"3px\",\n            opacity: 0.8,\n            \"line-color\": \"#60a5fa\",\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".faded\",\n          style: {\n            opacity: 0.12,\n          },\n        },\n      ],\n    });\n\n    cy.on(\"tap\", \"node\", (event) => {\n      const node = event.target;\n      cy.elements().removeClass(\"active-node active-edge faded\");\n      cy.elements().removeClass(\"query-highlight query-connected\");\n      cy.elements().addClass(\"faded\");\n      node.removeClass(\"faded\").addClass(\"active-node\");\n      node.connectedEdges().removeClass(\"faded\").addClass(\"active-edge\");\n      node.connectedEdges().connectedNodes().removeClass(\"faded\");\n      onClearHighlights();\n\n      onNodeSelect({\n        nodeId: node.data(\"entity_id\"),\n        nodeKey: node.id(),\n        entityId: node.data(\"entity_id\"),\n        entityType: node.data(\"entity_type\"),\n        label: node.data(\"label\") ?? node.data(\"entity_id\"),\n      });\n    });\n\n    cy.on(\"tap\", (event) => {\n      if (event.target === cy) {\n        cy.elements().removeClass(\"active-node active-edge faded query-highlight query-connected\");\n        onNodeSelect(null);\n        onClearHighlights();\n      }\n    });\n\n    cyRef.current = cy;\n\n    return () => {\n      cy.destroy();\n      cyRef.current = null;\n    };\n  }, [onClearHighlights, onNodeSelect]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let isActive = true;\n\n    async function loadGraph() {\n      setLoading(true);\n      setError(null);\n      try {\n        const [graphPayload, graphStats] = await Promise.all([\n          expandTarget ? fetchSubgraph(expandTarget.nodeId, expandTarget.depth) : fetchGraph(),\n          fetchGraphStats(),\n        ]);\n\n        if (!isActive || !cyRef.current) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        cyRef.current.elements().remove();\n        cyRef.current.add(toElements(graphPayload));\n        cyRef.current.layout({\n          name: \"cose-bilkent\",\n          fit: true,\n          padding: 140,\n          nodeRepulsion: 240000,\n          idealEdgeLength: 180,\n          edgeElasticity: 0.12,\n          nestingFactor: 0.9,\n          gravity: 0.12,\n          tile: false,\n        } as cytoscape.LayoutOptions).run();\n\n        setStats(graphStats);\n      } catch (loadError) {\n        setError(loadError instanceof Error ? loadError.message : \"Unable to load graph\");\n      } finally {\n        if (isActive) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    void loadGraph();\n\n    return () => {\n      isActive = false;\n    };\n  }, [expandTarget, refreshToken]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!cyRef.current) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const cy = cyRef.current;\n    cy.elements().removeClass(\"query-highlight query-connected faded active-node active-edge\");\n\n    if (!highlightedNodes.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const normalizedIds = new Set(highlightedNodes.map(normalizeHighlightId));\n    const matches = cy.nodes().filter((node) => {\n      const nodeKey = String(node.id());\n      const entityId = String(node.data(\"entity_id\") ?? \"\");\n      return normalizedIds.has(nodeKey) || normalizedIds.has(entityId) || normalizedIds.has(normalizeHighlightId(nodeKey));\n    });\n\n    if (!matches.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    matches.addClass(\"query-highlight\");\n    matches.connectedEdges().addClass(\"query-connected\");\n    matches.forEach((node) => {\n      node.animate({ style: { width: 18, height: 18 } }, { duration: 180 });\n      node.animate({ style: { width: 16, height: 16 } }, { duration: 180 });\n    });\n\n    cy.fit(matches, 180);\n  }, [highlightedNodes]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"relative flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col bg-white\">\n      <div className=\"relative min-h-0 flex-1\">\n        <div ref={containerRef} className=\"h-full w-full\" />\n\n        {loading ? (\n          <div className=\"absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/75 backdrop-blur-sm\">\n            <div className=\"rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white px-5 py-3 text-sm text-slate-600 shadow-sm\">\n              Loading graph...\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        ) : null}\n\n        {error ? (\n          <div className=\"absolute left-4 top-24 max-w-md rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-rose-700\">\n            {error}\n          </div>\n        ) : null}\n\n        <div className=\"absolute bottom-4 right-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/90 px-4 py-3 text-xs text-slate-500 shadow-sm backdrop-blur\">\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-6 gap-y-2 sm:grid-cols-4\">\n            {Object.entries(NODE_TYPE_COLORS).map(([type, color]) => (\n              <div key={type} className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                <span className=\"size-2 rounded-full\" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />\n                <span className=\"capitalize\">{type}</span>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"mt-3 text-[11px] text-slate-400\">{stats ? `${stats.total_nodes} nodes · ${stats.total_edges} edges` : \"Loading stats...\"}</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n''', encoding='utf-8')\n'@ | python -",
  "workdir": "c:\\Projects\\DodgeAI-Assignment",
  "timeout_ms": 20000,
  "login": false
}

{
  "command": "@'\nimport { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from \"react\";\n\nimport { queryGraph } from \"../services/api\";\nimport type { ChatMessage } from \"../types/api\";\n\ninterface ChatPanelProps {\n  highlightedNodes: string[];\n  onHighlightNodes: (nodeIds: string[]) => void;\n}\n\nfunction createMessageId() {\n  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\n}\n\nexport function ChatPanel({ highlightedNodes, onHighlightNodes }: ChatPanelProps) {\n  const [input, setInput] = useState(\"\");\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([\n    {\n      id: createMessageId(),\n      role: \"assistant\",\n      text: \"Hi! I can help you analyze the Order to Cash process.\",\n    },\n  ]);\n  const [isThinking, setIsThinking] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {\n      if (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n        setInput(\"\");\n      }\n    };\n\n    window.addEventListener(\"keydown\", handleKeyDown);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener(\"keydown\", handleKeyDown);\n  }, []);\n\n  const activeHighlightCount = useMemo(() => highlightedNodes.length, [highlightedNodes.length]);\n\n  const handleSend = async () => {\n    const question = input.trim();\n    if (!question || isThinking) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const userMessage: ChatMessage = {\n      id: createMessageId(),\n      role: \"user\",\n      text: question,\n    };\n\n    setMessages((current) => [...current, userMessage]);\n    setInput(\"\");\n    setIsThinking(true);\n\n    try {\n      const response = await queryGraph(question);\n      const rejected = response.answer.includes(\"designed to answer questions related to the dataset only\");\n      const assistantMessage: ChatMessage = {\n        id: createMessageId(),\n        role: \"assistant\",\n        text: response.answer,\n        relevantNodeIds: response.relevant_node_ids,\n        rawData: response.raw_data,\n        rejected,\n      };\n      setMessages((current) => [...current, assistantMessage]);\n      onHighlightNodes(response.relevant_node_ids ?? []);\n    } catch (error) {\n      const message: ChatMessage = {\n        id: createMessageId(),\n        role: \"assistant\",\n        text: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Query failed. Please try again.\",\n      };\n      setMessages((current) => [...current, message]);\n      onHighlightNodes([]);\n    } finally {\n      setIsThinking(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <aside className=\"ml-4 flex w-[430px] shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-[22px] border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm\">\n      <div className=\"flex h-full min-h-0 w-full flex-col\">\n        <div className=\"border-b border-slate-200 px-5 py-4\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-[18px] font-semibold text-slate-950\">Chat with Graph</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-slate-500\">Order to Cash</p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"border-b border-slate-100 px-5 py-5\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-start gap-4\">\n            <div className=\"flex size-12 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-950 text-lg font-semibold text-white\">\n              D\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <h3 className=\"text-[18px] font-semibold text-slate-950\">Dodge AI</h3>\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">Graph Agent</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 space-y-4 overflow-auto px-5 py-5\">\n          {messages.map((message) => (\n            <div key={message.id} className=\"space-y-2\">\n              <div className={`text-[15px] leading-8 ${message.rejected ? \"text-amber-700\" : \"text-slate-900\"}`}>\n                {message.text}\n              </div>\n              {message.relevantNodeIds && message.relevantNodeIds.length > 0 ? (\n                <div className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">\n                  Highlighted {message.relevantNodeIds.length} node(s) in the graph.\n                </div>\n              ) : null}\n            </div>\n          ))}\n          {isThinking ? <div className=\"text-[15px] text-slate-500\">Thinking through the graph...</div> : null}\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"border-t border-slate-200 p-5\">\n          <div className=\"mb-3 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-emerald-100 bg-emerald-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-emerald-700\">\n            <span className=\"size-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500\" />\n            Dodge AI is awaiting instructions\n            <span className=\"ml-auto text-slate-400\">{activeHighlightCount > 0 ? `${activeHighlightCount} highlighted` : \"Ready\"}</span>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm\">\n            <textarea\n              className=\"h-28 w-full resize-none border-0 bg-transparent text-[15px] text-slate-900 outline-none placeholder:text-slate-400\"\n              onChange={(event) => setInput(event.target.value)}\n              onKeyDown={(event) => {\n                if (event.key === \"Enter\" && !event.shiftKey) {\n                  event.preventDefault();\n                  void handleSend();\n                }\n                if (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n                  setInput(\"\");\n                }\n              }}\n              placeholder=\"Analyze anything\"\n              value={input}\n            />\n            <div className=\"mt-4 flex items-center justify-end\">\n              <button\n                className=\"rounded-2xl bg-slate-500 px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-600 disabled:opacity-60\"\n                disabled={isThinking || !input.trim()}\n                onClick={() => void handleSend()}\n                type=\"button\"\n              >\n                Send\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </aside>\n  );\n}\n'@ | Set-Content frontend\\src\\components\\ChatPanel.tsx",

{
  "command": "@'\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\n\nimport { addGraphEdge, addGraphNode, exportGraphJson, resetGraph } from \"../services/api\";\n\ninterface ToolbarProps {\n  onGraphChanged: (message: string) => void;\n  onShowFullGraph: () => void;\n}\n\ntype ModalMode = \"node\" | \"edge\" | null;\n\nconst inputClassName =\n  \"w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 outline-none transition focus:border-sky-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-100\";\n\nexport function Toolbar({ onGraphChanged, onShowFullGraph }: ToolbarProps) {\n  const [modalMode, setModalMode] = useState<ModalMode>(null);\n  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [nodeForm, setNodeForm] = useState({\n    id: \"\",\n    type: \"Product\",\n    metadata: '{\\n  \"name\": \"Sample Node\"\\n}',\n  });\n  const [edgeForm, setEdgeForm] = useState({\n    source: \"\",\n    target: \"\",\n    relationship: \"order_to_product\",\n  });\n\n  const closeModal = () => {\n    setError(null);\n    setModalMode(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleAddNode = async () => {\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await addGraphNode({\n        id: nodeForm.id,\n        type: nodeForm.type,\n        metadata: JSON.parse(nodeForm.metadata),\n      });\n      closeModal();\n      onGraphChanged(`Added ${nodeForm.type} node ${nodeForm.id}.`);\n    } catch (submitError) {\n      setError(submitError instanceof Error ? submitError.message : \"Unable to add node\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAddEdge = async () => {\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await addGraphEdge(edgeForm);\n      closeModal();\n      onGraphChanged(`Added edge ${edgeForm.relationship} from ${edgeForm.source} to ${edgeForm.target}.`);\n    } catch (submitError) {\n      setError(submitError instanceof Error ? submitError.message : \"Unable to add edge\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleReset = async () => {\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      await resetGraph();\n      onShowFullGraph();\n      onGraphChanged(\"Graph reset from backend source data.\");\n    } catch (resetError) {\n      setError(resetError instanceof Error ? resetError.message : \"Unable to reset graph\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleExport = async () => {\n    setSubmitting(true);\n    setError(null);\n    try {\n      const blob = await exportGraphJson();\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const anchor = document.createElement(\"a\");\n      anchor.href = url;\n      anchor.download = \"sap-o2c-graph.json\";\n      anchor.click();\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n      onGraphChanged(\"Exported graph JSON.\");\n    } catch (exportError) {\n      setError(exportError instanceof Error ? exportError.message : \"Unable to export graph\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <section className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-4\">\n      <div className=\"mb-4\">\n        <p className=\"text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.28em] text-slate-400\">Controls</p>\n        <h2 className=\"mt-1 text-lg font-semibold text-slate-950\">Graph Toolbar</h2>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3\">\n        <button className=\"rounded-xl bg-slate-950 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-800\" onClick={() => setModalMode(\"node\")} type=\"button\">Add Node</button>\n        <button className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-50\" onClick={() => setModalMode(\"edge\")} type=\"button\">Add Edge</button>\n        <button className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-60\" disabled={submitting} onClick={() => void handleReset()} type=\"button\">Reset Graph</button>\n        <button className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 transition hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-60\" disabled={submitting} onClick={() => void handleExport()} type=\"button\">Export JSON</button>\n      </div>\n\n      {error ? <div className=\"mt-4 rounded-xl border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-rose-700\">{error}</div> : null}\n\n      {modalMode ? (\n        <div className=\"mt-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4\">\n          <div className=\"mb-3 flex items-center justify-between\">\n            <h3 className=\"text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900\">{modalMode === \"node\" ? \"Create Node\" : \"Create Edge\"}</h3>\n            <button className=\"text-sm text-slate-500 transition hover:text-slate-900\" onClick={closeModal} type=\"button\">Close</button>\n          </div>\n\n          {modalMode === \"node\" ? (\n            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n              <input className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setNodeForm((current) => ({ ...current, id: event.target.value }))} placeholder=\"Node ID\" value={nodeForm.id} />\n              <select className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setNodeForm((current) => ({ ...current, type: event.target.value }))} value={nodeForm.type}>\n                {[\"Order\", \"Delivery\", \"Invoice\", \"Payment\", \"Customer\", \"Product\", \"Address\"].map((type) => (\n                  <option key={type} value={type}>{type}</option>\n                ))}\n              </select>\n              <textarea className={`${inputClassName} min-h-32`} onChange={(event) => setNodeForm((current) => ({ ...current, metadata: event.target.value }))} value={nodeForm.metadata} />\n              <button className=\"w-full rounded-xl bg-slate-950 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-800 disabled:opacity-60\" disabled={submitting || !nodeForm.id.trim()} onClick={() => void handleAddNode()} type=\"button\">{submitting ? \"Saving...\" : \"Create Node\"}</button>\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n              <input className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setEdgeForm((current) => ({ ...current, source: event.target.value }))} placeholder=\"Source ID\" value={edgeForm.source} />\n              <input className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setEdgeForm((current) => ({ ...current, target: event.target.value }))} placeholder=\"Target ID\" value={edgeForm.target} />\n              <select className={inputClassName} onChange={(event) => setEdgeForm((current) => ({ ...current, relationship: event.target.value }))} value={edgeForm.relationship}>\n                {[\"order_to_delivery\", \"delivery_to_invoice\", \"invoice_to_payment\", \"order_to_customer\", \"order_to_product\", \"customer_to_address\"].map((relationship) => (\n                  <option key={relationship} value={relationship}>{relationship}</option>\n                ))}\n              </select>\n              <button className=\"w-full rounded-xl bg-slate-950 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition hover:bg-slate-800 disabled:opacity-60\" disabled={submitting || !edgeForm.source.trim() || !edgeForm.target.trim()} onClick={() => void handleAddEdge()} type=\"button\">{submitting ? \"Saving...\" : \"Create Edge\"}</button>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : null}\n    </section>\n  );\n}\n'@ | Set-Content frontend\\src\\components\\Toolbar.tsx",

{
  "command": "@'\nimport { useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\n\nimport cytoscape, { type Core, type ElementDefinition } from \"cytoscape\";\nimport coseBilkent from \"cytoscape-cose-bilkent\";\n\nimport { fetchGraph, fetchGraphStats, fetchSubgraph } from \"../services/api\";\nimport type { GraphPayload, GraphStats, NodeSummary } from \"../types/api\";\nimport { DEFAULT_NODE_COLOR, NODE_TYPE_COLORS } from \"../types/graph\";\n\ncytoscape.use(coseBilkent);\n\ninterface GraphViewerProps {\n  expandTarget: { nodeId: string; depth: number } | null;\n  highlightedNodes: string[];\n  onClearHighlights: () => void;\n  onNodeSelect: (node: NodeSummary | null) => void;\n  refreshToken: number;\n}\n\nfunction toElements(payload: GraphPayload): ElementDefinition[] {\n  const nodes = payload.nodes.map((node) => ({ data: node.data }));\n  const edges = payload.edges.map((edge) => ({ data: edge.data }));\n  return [...nodes, ...edges];\n}\n\nfunction normalizeHighlightId(value: string): string {\n  const trimmed = value.trim();\n  const parts = trimmed.split(\":\");\n  return parts[parts.length - 1] ?? trimmed;\n}\n\nexport function GraphViewer({\n  expandTarget,\n  highlightedNodes,\n  onClearHighlights,\n  onNodeSelect,\n  refreshToken,\n}: GraphViewerProps) {\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);\n  const cyRef = useRef<Core | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [stats, setStats] = useState<GraphStats | null>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!containerRef.current || cyRef.current) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const cy = cytoscape({\n      container: containerRef.current,\n      elements: [],\n      layout: {\n        name: \"cose-bilkent\",\n        fit: true,\n        padding: 120,\n        nodeRepulsion: 240000,\n        idealEdgeLength: 180,\n        edgeElasticity: 0.12,\n        nestingFactor: 0.9,\n        gravity: 0.12,\n        tile: false,\n      } as cytoscape.LayoutOptions,\n      style: [\n        {\n          selector: \"node\",\n          style: {\n            \"background-color\": (element) => NODE_TYPE_COLORS[element.data(\"entity_type\")] ?? DEFAULT_NODE_COLOR,\n            label: \"\",\n            width: \"8\",\n            height: \"8\",\n            opacity: 0.95,\n            \"border-width\": 0,\n            \"overlay-opacity\": 0,\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \"edge\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"1.8px\",\n            \"line-color\": \"#8fd0ff\",\n            \"target-arrow-color\": \"#8fd0ff\",\n            \"target-arrow-shape\": \"none\",\n            \"curve-style\": \"straight\",\n            opacity: 0.45,\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".active-node\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"14\",\n            height: \"14\",\n            \"background-color\": \"#111827\",\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".active-edge\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"2.8px\",\n            opacity: 0.9,\n            \"line-color\": \"#38bdf8\",\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".query-highlight\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"16\",\n            height: \"16\",\n            \"background-color\": \"#ef4444\",\n            \"underlay-color\": \"#fecaca\",\n            \"underlay-padding\": \"7px\",\n            \"underlay-opacity\": 0.95,\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".query-connected\",\n          style: {\n            width: \"3px\",\n            opacity: 0.8,\n            \"line-color\": \"#60a5fa\",\n          },\n        },\n        {\n          selector: \".faded\",\n          style: {\n            opacity: 0.12,\n          },\n        },\n      ],\n    });\n\n    cy.on(\"tap\", \"node\", (event) => {\n      const node = event.target;\n      cy.elements().removeClass(\"active-node active-edge faded\");\n      cy.elements().removeClass(\"query-highlight query-connected\");\n      cy.elements().addClass(\"faded\");\n      node.removeClass(\"faded\").addClass(\"active-node\");\n      node.connectedEdges().removeClass(\"faded\").addClass(\"active-edge\");\n      node.connectedEdges().connectedNodes().removeClass(\"faded\");\n      onClearHighlights();\n\n      onNodeSelect({\n        nodeId: node.data(\"entity_id\"),\n        nodeKey: node.id(),\n        entityId: node.data(\"entity_id\"),\n        entityType: node.data(\"entity_type\"),\n        label: node.data(\"label\") ?? node.data(\"entity_id\"),\n      });\n    });\n\n    cy.on(\"tap\", (event) => {\n      if (event.target === cy) {\n        cy.elements().removeClass(\"active-node active-edge faded query-highlight query-connected\");\n        onNodeSelect(null);\n        onClearHighlights();\n      }\n    });\n\n    cyRef.current = cy;\n\n    return () => {\n      cy.destroy();\n      cyRef.current = null;\n    };\n  }, [onClearHighlights, onNodeSelect]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let isActive = true;\n\n    async function loadGraph() {\n      setLoading(true);\n      setError(null);\n      try {\n        const [graphPayload, graphStats] = await Promise.all([\n          expandTarget ? fetchSubgraph(expandTarget.nodeId, expandTarget.depth) : fetchGraph(),\n          fetchGraphStats(),\n        ]);\n\n        if (!isActive || !cyRef.current) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        cyRef.current.elements().remove();\n        cyRef.current.add(toElements(graphPayload));\n        cyRef.current.layout({\n          name: \"cose-bilkent\",\n          fit: true,\n          padding: 140,\n          nodeRepulsion: 240000,\n          idealEdgeLength: 180,\n          edgeElasticity: 0.12,\n          nestingFactor: 0.9,\n          gravity: 0.12,\n          tile: false,\n        } as cytoscape.LayoutOptions).run();\n\n        setStats(graphStats);\n      } catch (loadError) {\n        setError(loadError instanceof Error ? loadError.message : \"Unable to load graph\");\n      } finally {\n        if (isActive) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    void loadGraph();\n\n    return () => {\n      isActive = false;\n    };\n  }, [expandTarget, refreshToken]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!cyRef.current) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const cy = cyRef.current;\n    cy.elements().removeClass(\"query-highlight query-connected faded active-node active-edge\");\n\n    if (!highlightedNodes.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const normalizedIds = new Set(highlightedNodes.map(normalizeHighlightId));\n    const matches = cy.nodes().filter((node) => {\n      const nodeKey = String(node.id());\n      const entityId = String(node.data(\"entity_id\") ?? \"\");\n      return normalizedIds.has(nodeKey) || normalizedIds.has(entityId) || normalizedIds.has(normalizeHighlightId(nodeKey));\n    });\n\n    if (!matches.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    matches.addClass(\"query-highlight\");\n    matches.connectedEdges().addClass(\"query-connected\");\n    matches.forEach((node) => {\n      node.animate({ style: { width: 18, height: 18 } }, { duration: 180 });\n      node.animate({ style: { width: 16, height: 16 } }, { duration: 180 });\n    });\n\n    cy.fit(matches, 180);\n  }, [highlightedNodes]);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"relative flex h-full min-h-0 flex-col bg-white\">\n      <div className=\"relative min-h-0 flex-1\">\n        <div ref={containerRef} (\n          <div className=\"absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/75 backdrop-blur-sm\">\n            <div className=\"rounded-full border border-slate-200 bg-white px-5 py-3 text-sm text-slate-600 shadow-sm\">\n              Loading graph...\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        ) : null}\n\n        {error ? (\n          <div className=\"absolute left-4 top-24 max-w-md rounded-2xl border border-rose-200 bg-rose-50 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-rose-700\">\n            {error}\n          </div>\n        ) : null}\n\n        <div className=\"absolute bottom-4 right-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white/90 px-4 py-3 text-xs text-slate-500 shadow-sm backdrop-blur\">\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-6 gap-y-2 sm:grid-cols-4\">\n            {Object.entries(NODE_TYPE_COLORS).map(([type, color]) => (\n              <div key={type} className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                <span className=\"size-2 rounded-full\" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />\n                <span className=\"capitalize\">{type}</span>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"mt-3 text-[11px] text-slate-400\">{stats ? `${stats.total_nodes} nodes · ${stats.total_edges} edges` : \"Loading stats...\"}</div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n'@ | Set-Content frontend\\src\\components\\GraphViewer.tsx",
