       '    \"aggregation_field\": \"amount\"\\n'\n            \"  },\\n\"\n            '  \"sql_query\": \"SELECT ...\",\\n'\n            '  \"explanation\": \"1-2 sentence explanation of what the query does\"\\n'\n            \"}\\n\\n\"\n            f\"QUESTION: {question}\"\n        )\n\n        if not is_gemini_available():\n            LOGGER.warning(\"No Gemini API key found, using mock mode\")\n            translated = self._mock_translate(question, memory)\n            self._append_log(\n                stage=\"translation-mock\",\n                question=question,\n                prompt=prompt,\n                response=translated.model_dump_json(indent=2),\n                notes=\"Mock translator used.\",\n            )\n            return translated\n\n        for attempt in range(2):\n            active_prompt = prompt if attempt == 0 else prompt + \"\\n\\nReturn ONLY valid JSON. No markdown, no commentary.\"\n            try:\n                response = await call_gemini(active_prompt, system_instruction)\n                parsed = self._parse_translation_payload(response)\n                self._append_log(\n                    stage=f\"translation-llm-attempt-{attempt + 1}\",\n                    question=question,\n                    prompt=active_prompt,\n                    response=response,\n                    notes=\"Translation successful.\",\n                )\n                return parsed\n            except Exception as exc:\n                self._append_log(\n                    stage=f\"translation-llm-attempt-{attempt + 1}\",\n                    question=question,\n                    prompt=active_prompt,\n                    response=str(exc),\n                    notes=\"Translation attempt failed.\",\n                )\n\n        fallback = self._mock_translate(question, memory)\n        self._append_log(\n            stage=\"translation-fallback\",\n            question=question,\n            prompt=prompt,\n            response=fallback.model_dump_json(indent=2),\n            notes=\"LLM translation failed; deterministic fallback used.\",\n        )\n        return fallback\n\n    def _parse_translation_payload(self, response: str) -> TranslationPayload:\n        match = re.search(r\"\\{.*\\}\", response, re.DOTALL)\n        if not match:\n            raise ValueError(\"No JSON object found in translator response\")\n        payload = json.loads(match.group(0))\n        graph_operation = GraphOperation.model_validate(payload.get(\"graph_operation\") or payload)\n        normalized = self._normalize_graph_operation(graph_operation)\n        sql_query = str(payload.get(\"sql_query\") or \"\").strip()\n        if not sql_query:\n            sql_query = self._build_sql_from_graph_operation(normalized)\n        explanation = str(payload.get(\"explanation\") or \"\").strip() or \"Generated graph traversal and SQL translation for the dataset query.\"\n        parsed = TranslationPayload(graph_operation=normalized, sql_query=sql_query, explanation=explanation)\n        self._append_log(\n            stage=\"translation-refinement\",\n            question=\"\",\n            prompt=\"Normalized translation payload prepared for execution.\",\n            response=parsed.model_dump_json(indent=2),\n            notes=\"Structured graph operation and SQL query accepted.\",\n        )\n        return parsed\n\n    def _normalize_graph_operation(self, operation: GraphOperation) -> GraphOperation:\n        entity = ENTITY_ALIASES.get((operation.entity or \"\").lower(), operation.entity)\n        traverse_to = ENTITY_ALIASES.get((operation.traverse_to or \"\").lower(), operation.traverse_to)\n        filters: dict[str, Any] = {}\n        for key, value in operation.filters.items():\n            normalized_key = FIELD_ALIASES.get(key, key)\n            filters[normalized_key] = value\n        return GraphOperation(\n            operation=operation.operation,\n            entity=entity,\n            filters=filters,\n            traverse_to=traverse_to,\n            depth=operation.depth,\n            aggregation=operation.aggregation,\n            aggregation_field=FIELD_ALIASES.get(operation.aggregation_field or \"\", operation.aggregation_field),\n            reason=operation.reason,\n        )\n\n    def _mock_translate(self, question: str, memory: ConversationMemory | None) -> TranslationPayload:\n        lowered = question.lower()\n        entity = self._detect_entity(question)\n        record_id = self._extract_id(question)\n        if not record_id and memory is not None and any(token in lowered for token in {\"these\", \"their\", \"them\", \"first one\", \"first\"}):\n            recent_entities = memory.get_last_entities()\n            if recent_entities:\n                entity = recent_entities[0][\"entity_type\"]\n                record_id = recent_entities[0][\"entity_id\"]\n\n        if any(term in lowered for term in [\"chain\", \"flow\", \"trace\", \"full path\"]):\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(\n                operation=\"chain\",\n                entity=entity or self._entity_from_id(record_id) or \"Invoice\",\n                filters={\"id\": record_id} if record_id else {},\n                depth=4,\n            )\n        elif any(term in lowered for term in [\"highest\", \"most\", \"top\"]):\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(\n                operation=\"aggregate\",\n                entity=entity or \"Product\",\n                filters={},\n                aggregation=\"max\",\n                aggregation_field=\"invoices\",\n            )\n        elif \"count\" in lowered or lowered.startswith(\"how many\"):\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(operation=\"count\", entity=entity or \"Order\", filters={\"id\": record_id} if record_id else {})\n        elif any(term in lowered for term in [\"linked\", \"connected\", \"deliveries\", \"invoices\", \"payments\"]):\n            traverse_to = None\n            if \"deliver\" in lowered:\n                traverse_to = \"Delivery\"\n            elif \"invoice\" in lowered or \"billing\" in lowered:\n                traverse_to = \"Invoice\"\n            elif \"payment\" in lowered or \"journal\" in lowered:\n                traverse_to = \"Payment\"\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(\n                operation=\"traverse\",\n                entity=entity or self._entity_from_id(record_id) or \"Order\",\n                filters={\"id\": record_id} if record_id else {},\n                traverse_to=traverse_to,\n                depth=2,\n            )\n        elif record_id:\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(\n                operation=\"find_node\",\n                entity=self._entity_from_id(record_id) or entity or \"Order\",\n                filters={\"id\": record_id},\n            )\n        else:\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(operation=\"find_node\", entity=entity or \"Order\", filters={})\n\n        graph_operation = self._normalize_graph_operation(graph_operation)\n        sql_query = self._build_sql_from_graph_operation(graph_operation)\n        explanation = \"This translates the request into a graph traversal and an equivalent SQL query over the normalized in-memory SQLite tables.\"\n        return TranslationPayload(graph_operation=graph_operation, sql_query=sql_query, explanation=explanation)\n\n    def _detect_entity(self, question: str) -> str | None:\n        lowered = question.lower()\n        for key, value in ENTITY_ALIASES.items():\n            if key in lowered:\n                return value\n        return None\n\n    def _extract_id(self, question: str) -> str | None:\n        match = re.search(r\"\\b(?:32\\d{7}|74\\d{4}|80\\d{6}|90\\d{6}|91\\d{6}|94\\d{8})\\b\", question)\n        return match.group(0) if match else None\n\n    def _entity_from_id(self, value: str | None) -> str | None:\n        if not value:\n            return None\n        if value.startswith(\"74\") and len(value) == 6:\n            return \"Order\"\n        if value.startswith(\"80\") and len(value) == 8:\n            return \"Delivery\"\n        if value.startswith((\"90\", \"91\")) and len(value) == 8:\n            return \"Invoice\"\n        if value.startswith(\"94\") and len(value) == 10:\n            return \"Payment\"\n        if value.startswith(\"32\") and len(value) == 9:\n            return \"Customer\"\n        return None\n\n    def _get_sql_schema_prompt(self) -> str:\n        schema = self.sql_engine.get_schema_overview()\n        lines = []\n        for table, columns in schema.items():\n            lines.append(f\"- {table}: columns [{', '.join(columns)}]\")\n        return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n\n    def _build_generated_query(self, translation: TranslationPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        graph_query_string = self._format_graph_query_string(translation.graph_operation)\n        sql_query = translation.sql_query.strip() or self._build_sql_from_graph_operation(translation.graph_operation)\n        return {\n            \"type\": \"graph_traversal\",\n            \"query_string\": sql_query,\n            \"structured_form\": translation.model_dump(mode=\"json\"),\n            \"explanation\": translation.explanation,\n            \"sql_query\": sql_query,\n            \"graph_query_string\": graph_query_string,\n        }\n\n    def _format_graph_query_string(self, query: GraphOperation) -> str:\n        filters = \", \".join(f\"{key}={value}\" for key, value in query.filters.items()) or \"all\"\n        if query.operation == \"chain\":\n            return f\"find_node({query.entity}, {filters}) -> chain(Order -> Delivery -> Invoice -> Payment)\"\n        if query.operation == \"traverse\":\n            return f\"find_node({query.entity}, {filters}) -> traverse({query.traverse_to}, depth={query.depth or 1})\"\n        if query.operation == \"aggregate\":\n            return f\"aggregate({query.entity}, field={query.aggregation_field}, op={query.aggregation})\"\n        if query.operation == \"count\":\n            return f\"count({query.entity}, {filters})\"\n        return f\"find_node({query.entity}, {filters})\"\n\n    def _sql_literal(self, value: Any) -> str:\n        escaped = str(value).replace(\"'\", \"''\")\n        return f\"'{escaped}'\"\n\n    def _build_where_clause(self, alias: str, filters: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n        clauses = []\n        for key, value in filters.items():\n            column = FIELD_ALIASES.get(key, key)\n            clauses.append(f\"{alias}.{column} = {self._sql_literal(value)}\")\n        return \" AND \".join(clauses) if clauses else \"1=1\"\n\n    def _build_sql_from_graph_operation(self, query: GraphOperation) -> str:\n        entity = query.entity or \"Order\"\n        table = ENTITY_TABLES.get(entity, \"orders\")\n        alias = table[0]\n        where_clause = self._build_where_clause(alias, query.filters)\n\n        if query.operation in {\"find_node\", \"filter\"}:\n            return f\"SELECT {alias}.* FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause} LIMIT 50\"\n\n        if query.operation == \"count\":\n            return f\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause}\"\n\n        if query.operation == \"aggregate\":\n            if entity == \"Product\" and (query.aggregation_field or \"\").lower() in {\"invoice\", \"invoices\", \"billing\", \"billing_documents\"}:\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT ip.invoice_id) AS value \"\n                    \"FROM products p \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN invoice_products ip ON ip.product_id = p.id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('p', query.filters)} \"\n                    \"GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            field = FIELD_ALIASES.get(query.aggregation_field or \"amount\", query.aggregation_field or \"amount\")\n            aggregation = (query.aggregation or \"count\").upper()\n            if aggregation == \"COUNT\":\n                return f\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause}\"\n            return f\"SELECT {alias}.id, {aggregation}(CAST({alias}.{field} AS REAL)) AS value FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause} GROUP BY {alias}.id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 50\"\n\n        if query.operation == \"traverse\":\n            target = query.traverse_to or entity\n            if entity == \"Order\" and target == \"Delivery\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT d.* FROM orders o \"\n                    \"JOIN order_deliveries od ON od.order_id = o.id \"\n                    \"JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = od.delivery_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('o', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            if entity == \"Delivery\" and target == \"Invoice\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT i.* FROM deliveries d \"\n                    \"JOIN delivery_invoices di ON di.delivery_id = d.id \"\n                    \"JOIN invoices i ON i.id = di.invoice_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('d', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            if entity == \"Invoice\" and target == \"Payment\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT p.* FROM invoices i \"\n                    \"JOIN invoice_payments ip ON ip.invoice_id = i.id \"\n                    \"JOIN payments p ON p.id = ip.payment_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('i', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            if entity == \"Order\" and target == \"Customer\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT c.* FROM orders o \"\n                    \"JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('o', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            if entity == \"Order\" and target == \"Product\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT p.* FROM orders o \"\n                    \"JOIN order_products op ON op.order_id = o.id \"\n                    \"JOIN products p ON p.id = op.product_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('o', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            if entity == \"Customer\" and target == \"Address\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT a.* FROM customers c \"\n                    \"JOIN customer_addresses ca ON ca.customer_id = c.id \"\n                    \"JOIN addresses a ON a.id = ca.address_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('c', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            if entity == \"Customer\" and target == \"Delivery\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT DISTINCT d.* FROM customers c \"\n                    \"JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id \"\n                    \"JOIN order_deliveries od ON od.order_id = o.id \"\n                    \"JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = od.delivery_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('c', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            return f\"SELECT {alias}.* FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause} LIMIT 50\"\n\n        if query.operation == \"chain\":\n            if entity == \"Invoice\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT i.id AS invoice_id, d.id AS delivery_id, o.id AS order_id, p.id AS payment_id \"\n                    \"FROM invoices i \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN delivery_invoices di ON di.invoice_id = i.id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = di.delivery_id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN order_deliveries od ON od.delivery_id = d.id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.id = od.order_id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN invoice_payments ip ON ip.invoice_id = i.id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.id = ip.payment_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('i', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            if entity == \"Order\":\n                return (\n                    \"SELECT o.id AS order_id, d.id AS delivery_id, i.id AS invoice_id, p.id AS payment_id \"\n                    \"FROM orders o \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN order_deliveries od ON od.order_id = o.id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN deliveries d ON d.id = od.delivery_id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN delivery_invoices di ON di.delivery_id = d.id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.id = di.invoice_id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN invoice_payments ip ON ip.invoice_id = i.id \"\n                    \"LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.id = ip.payment_id \"\n                    f\"WHERE {self._build_where_clause('o', query.filters)} LIMIT 50\"\n                )\n            return f\"SELECT {alias}.* FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause} LIMIT 50\"\n\n        return f\"SELECT {alias}.* FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause} LIMIT 50\"\n\n    def _execute_graph(self, query: GraphOperation) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        handlers = {\n            \"find_node\": self._execute_find_node,\n            \"traverse\": self._execute_traverse,\n            \"filter\": self._execute_filter,\n            \"aggregate\": self._execute_aggregate,\n            \"count\": self._execute_count,\n            \"chain\": self._execute_chain,\n        }\n        handler = handlers.get(query.operation)\n        if handler is None:\n            return {\"operation\": query.operation, \"records\": [], \"path_edges\": [], \"error\": \"Unsupported operation\"}\n        return handler(query)\n\n    def _matching_nodes(self, entity: str | None, filters: dict[str, Any]) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]]:\n        matches = []\n        target_type = entity.lower() if entity else None\n        for node_key, attrs in self.builder.graph.nodes(data=True):\n            if target_type and attrs.get(\"entity_type\") != target_type:\n                continue\n            if self._matches_filters(attrs, filters):\n                matches.append((node_key, dict(attrs)))\n        return matches\n\n    def _matches_filters(self, attrs: dict[str, Any], filters: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n        if not filters:\n            return True\n        metadata = attrs.get(\"metadata\") if isinstance(attrs.get(\"metadata\"), dict) else {}\n        for field, expected in filters.items():\n            if expected is None:\n                continue\n            expected_str = str(expected).lower()\n            normalized_field = FIELD_ALIASES.get(field, field)\n            if normalized_field == \"id\":\n                actual = attrs.get(\"entity_id\")\n            else:\n                actual = attrs.get(normalized_field, metadata.get(normalized_field))\n                if actual is None:\n                    actual = metadata.get(field)\n            if actual is None:\n                return False\n            if isinstance(actual, list):\n                if not any(expected_str in str(item).lower() for item in actual):\n                    return False\n            else:\n                if expected_str not in str(actual).lower():\n                    return False\n        return True\n\n    def _node_payload(self, node_key: str, attrs: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        payload = dict(attrs)\n        payload[\"node_id\"] = node_key\n        return payload\n\n    def _edge_payload(self, source: str, target: str, key: str, attrs: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        return {\n            \"edge_id\": key,\n            \"source\": source,\n            \"target\": target,\n            \"relationship\": attrs.get(\"relationship\") or attrs.get(\"edge_type\"),\n            \"edge_type\": attrs.get(\"edge_type\") or attrs.get(\"relationship\"),\n        }\n\n    def _execute_find_node(self, query: GraphOperation) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        matches = [self._node_payload(key, attrs) for key, attrs in self._matching_nodes(query.entity, query.filters)]\n        return {\"operation\": query.operation, \"records\": matches, \"path_edges\": []}\n\n    def _execute_filter(self, query: GraphOperation) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        return self._execute_find_node(query)\n\n    def _execute_count(self, query: GraphOperation) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        matches = [self._node_payload(key, attrs) for key, attrs in self._matching_nodes(query.entity, query.filters)]\n        return {\"operation\": query.operation, \"count\": len(matches), \"records\": matches, \"path_edges\": []}\n\n    def _execute_traverse(self, query: GraphOperation) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        depth = query.depth or 1\n        start_nodes = self._matching_nodes(query.entity, query.filters)\n        seen: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}\n        path_edges: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}\n        target_type = query.traverse_to.lower() if query.traverse_to else None\n        for node_key, _ in start_nodes:\n            subgraph = self.builder.get_subgraph(node_key, depth)\n            for sub_key, attrs in subgraph.nodes(data=True):\n                if target_type and attrs.get(\"entity_type\") != target_type and sub_key != node_key:\n                    continue\n                seen.setdefault(sub_key, self._node_payload(sub_key, dict(attrs)))\n            for source, target, key, attrs in subgraph.edges(keys=True, data=True):\n                if source in seen and target in seen:\n                    path_edges.setdefault(key, self._edge_payload(source, target, key, dict(attrs)))\n        return {\"operation\": query.operation, \"records\": list(seen.values()), \"path_edges\": list(path_edges.values())}\n\n    def _execute_aggregate(self, query: GraphOperation) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        matches = self._matching_nodes(query.entity, query.filters)\n        aggregation = (query.aggregation or \"count\").lower()\n        field = FIELD_ALIASES.get(query.aggregation_field or \"\", query.aggregation_field)\n        rows = []\n        for node_key, attrs in matches:\n            value = attrs.get(field) if field else None\n            if value is None and isinstance(attrs.get(\"metadata\"), dict) and field:\n                value = attrs[\"metadata\"].get(field)\n            if aggregation == \"count\":\n                metric = len(value) if isinstance(value, list) else 1\n            elif aggregation == \"max\" and isinstance(value, list):\n                metric = len(value)\n            else:\n                metric = self._to_number(value)\n                if metric is None:\n                    continue\n            rows.append({\n                \"node_id\": node_key,\n                \"entity_id\": attrs.get(\"entity_id\"),\n                \"entity_type\": attrs.get(\"entity_type\"),\n                \"value\": metric,\n            })\n\n        reverse = aggregation not in {\"min\"}\n        rows = sorted(rows, key=lambda item: item[\"value\"], reverse=reverse)\n        values = [row[\"value\"] for row in rows]\n        summary = None\n        if values:\n            if aggregation == \"sum\":\n                summary = sum(values)\n            elif aggregation == \"avg\":\n                summary = sum(values) / len(values)\n            elif aggregation == \"max\":\n                summary = max(values)\n            elif aggregation == \"min\":\n                summary = min(values)\n            elif aggregation == \"count\":\n                summary = len(rows)\n        return {\n            \"operation\": query.operation,\n            \"aggregation\": aggregation,\n            \"aggregation_field\": field,\n            \"summary\": summary,\n            \"records\": rows[:50],\n            \"path_edges\": [],\n        }\n\n    def _execute_chain(self, query: GraphOperation) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        start_nodes = self._matching_nodes(query.entity, query.filters)\n        graph = self.builder.graph\n        chains = []\n        path_edges: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}\n\n        def add_chain_edge(source: str, target: str) -> None:\n            if graph.has_edge(source, target):\n                for key, attrs in graph[source][target].items():\n                    path_edges.setdefault(key, self._edge_payload(source, target, key, dict(attrs)))\n\n        for node_key, attrs in start_nodes[:20]:\n            entity_type = attrs.get(\"entity_type\")\n            collected: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {node_key: self._node_payload(node_key, dict(attrs))}\n\n            if entity_type == \"order\":\n                delivery_keys = [key for key in graph.successors(node_key) if graph.nodes[key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"delivery\"]\n                invoice_keys = []\n                payment_keys = []\n                for delivery_key in delivery_keys:\n                    collected[delivery_key] = self._node_payload(delivery_key, dict(graph.nodes[delivery_key]))\n                    add_chain_edge(node_key, delivery_key)\n                    for invoice_key in graph.successors(delivery_key):\n                        if graph.nodes[invoice_key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"invoice\":\n                            invoice_keys.append(invoice_key)\n                for invoice_key in invoice_keys:\n                    collected[invoice_key] = self._node_payload(invoice_key, dict(graph.nodes[invoice_key]))\n                    for delivery_key in delivery_keys:\n                        add_chain_edge(delivery_key, invoice_key)\n                    for payment_key in graph.successors(invoice_key):\n                        if graph.nodes[payment_key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"payment\":\n                            payment_keys.append(payment_key)\n                for payment_key in payment_keys:\n                    collected[payment_key] = self._node_payload(payment_key, dict(graph.nodes[payment_key]))\n                    for invoice_key in invoice_keys:\n                        add_chain_edge(invoice_key, payment_key)\n\n            elif entity_type == \"invoice\":\n                delivery_keys = [key for key in graph.predecessors(node_key) if graph.nodes[key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"delivery\"]\n                payment_keys = [key for key in graph.successors(node_key) if graph.nodes[key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"payment\"]\n                order_keys = []\n                for delivery_key in delivery_keys:\n                    collected[delivery_key] = self._node_payload(delivery_key, dict(graph.nodes[delivery_key]))\n                    add_chain_edge(delivery_key, node_key)\n                    for order_key in graph.predecessors(delivery_key):\n                        if graph.nodes[order_key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"order\":\n                            order_keys.append(order_key)\n                for order_key in order_keys:\n                    collected[order_key] = self._node_payload(order_key, dict(graph.nodes[order_key]))\n                    for delivery_key in delivery_keys:\n                        add_chain_edge(order_key, delivery_key)\n                for payment_key in payment_keys:\n                    collected[payment_key] = self._node_payload(payment_key, dict(graph.nodes[payment_key]))\n                    add_chain_edge(node_key, payment_key)\n\n            elif entity_type == \"payment\":\n                invoice_keys = [key for key in graph.predecessors(node_key) if graph.nodes[key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"invoice\"]\n                delivery_keys = []\n                order_keys = []\n                for invoice_key in invoice_keys:\n                    collected[invoice_key] = self._node_payload(invoice_key, dict(graph.nodes[invoice_key]))\n                    add_chain_edge(invoice_key, node_key)\n                    for delivery_key in graph.predecessors(invoice_key):\n                        if graph.nodes[delivery_key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"delivery\":\n                            delivery_keys.append(delivery_key)\n                for delivery_key in delivery_keys:\n                    collected[delivery_key] = self._node_payload(delivery_key, dict(graph.nodes[delivery_key]))\n                    for invoice_key in invoice_keys:\n                        add_chain_edge(delivery_key, invoice_key)\n                    for order_key in graph.predecessors(delivery_key):\n                        if graph.nodes[order_key].get(\"entity_type\") == \"order\":\n                            order_keys.append(order_key)\n                for order_key in order_keys:\n                    collected[order_key] = self._node_payload(order_key, dict(graph.nodes[order_key]))\n                    for delivery_key in delivery_keys:\n                        add_chain_edge(order_key, delivery_key)\n\n            ordered = sorted(\n                collected.values(),\n                key=lambda item: (TYPE_ORDER.get(item.get(\"entity_type\"), 99), item.get(\"node_id\", \"\")),\n            )\n            chains.append({\"start_node_id\": node_key, \"chain\": ordered})\n\n        return {\"operation\": query.operation, \"records\": chains, \"path_edges\": list(path_edges.values())}\n\n    def _to_number(self, value: Any) -> float | None:\n        if value is None:\n            return None\n        if isinstance(value, (int, float)):\n            return float(value)\n        if isinstance(value, str):\n            try:\n                return float(value)\n            except ValueError:\n                return None\n        return None\n\n    def _build_raw_data(self, graph_result: dict[str, Any], sql_result: Any) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        raw_data = {\n            \"graph_result\": graph_result,\n            \"sql_result\": {\n                \"query\": sql_result.query,\n                \"rows\": sql_result.rows,\n                \"error\": sql_result.error,\n            },\n        }\n        return raw_data\n\n    async def _generate_answer(self, question: str, translation: TranslationPayload, raw_data: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n        if not is_gemini_available():\n            answer = self._mock_answer(question, translation, raw_data)\n            self._append_log(\n                stage=\"answer-mock\",\n                question=question,\n                prompt=\"Mock answer generator used\",\n                response=answer,\n                notes=\"No Gemini API key found, using mock mode\",\n            )\n            return answer\n\n        prompt, system_instruction = self._build_answer_prompt(question, translation, raw_data)\n        try:\n            response = await call_gemini(prompt, system_instruction)\n            self._append_log(\n                stage=\"answer-llm\",\n                question=question,\n                prompt=prompt,\n                response=response,\n                notes=\"Answer generated from graph and SQL results.\",\n            )\n            return response\n        except Exception as exc:\n            answer = self._mock_answer(question, translation, raw_data)\n            self._append_log(\n                stage=\"answer-llm-fallback\",\n                question=question,\n                prompt=prompt,\n                response=answer,\n                notes=f\"Gemini failed, fallback used: {exc}\",\n            )\n            return answer\n\n    async def _generate_answer_stream(self, question: str, translation: TranslationPayload, raw_data: dict[str, Any]) -> AsyncIterator[str]:\n        if not is_gemini_available():\n            answer = self._mock_answer(question, translation, raw_data)\n            for token in self._tokenize(answer):\n                yield token\n                await asyncio.sleep(0.02)\n            self._append_log(\n                stage=\"answer-stream-mock\",\n                question=question,\n                prompt=\"Mock answer stream used\",\n                response=answer,\n                notes=\"No Gemini API key found, using mock streaming mode.\",\n            )\n            return\n\n        prompt, system_instruction = self._build_answer_prompt(question, translation, raw_data)\n        chunks: list[str] = []\n        try:\n            async for token in stream_gemini(prompt, system_instruction):\n                chunks.append(token)\n                yield token\n            self._append_log(\n                stage=\"answer-stream-llm\",\n                question=question,\n                prompt=prompt,\n                response=\"\".join(chunks),\n                notes=\"Streaming answer generated from graph and SQL results.\",\n            )\n        except Exception as exc:\n            answer = self._mock_answer(question, translation, raw_data)\n            for token in self._tokenize(answer):\n                yield token\n                await asyncio.sleep(0.02)\n            self._append_log(\n                stage=\"answer-stream-fallback\",\n                question=question,\n                prompt=prompt,\n                response=answer,\n                notes=f\"Streaming Gemini failed, fallback used: {exc}\",\n            )\n\n    def _build_answer_prompt(self, question: str, translation: TranslationPayload, raw_data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, str]:\n        truncated = json.dumps(raw_data, indent=2, default=str)[:12000]\n        system_instruction = \"ROLE: You are a data analyst presenting query results.\"\n        prompt = (\n            f\"CONTEXT:\\n{truncated}\\n\\n\"\n            f\"QUESTION: {question}\\n\"\n            f\"GENERATED QUERY: {translation.model_dump_json(indent=2)}\\n\\n\"\n            \"TASK: Answer the user's question based ONLY on this data. Do not make up information.\\n\"\n            \"FORMAT: Respond with a clear natural language paragraph. If the data is tabular, include a brief summary.\"\n        )\n        return prompt, system_instruction\n\n    def _mock_answer(self, question: str, translation: TranslationPayload, raw_data: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n        graph_result = raw_data.get(\"graph_result\", {})\n        sql_result = raw_data.get(\"sql_result\", {})\n        records = graph_result.get(\"records\", []) if isinstance(graph_result, dict) else []\n        if translation.graph_operation.operation == \"count\":\n            count = graph_result.get(\"count\", len(records))\n            return f\"I found {count} matching {translation.graph_operation.entity or 'records'} in the graph and validated the count against the SQLite tables.\"\n        if translation.graph_operation.operation == \"aggregate\" and records:\n            top = records[0]\n            return f\"The top matching {translation.graph_operation.entity or 'record'} is {top.get('entity_id')} with value {top.get('value')}.\"\n        if translation.graph_operation.operation == \"chain\" and records:\n            chain = records[0][\"chain\"]\n            chain_ids = \" -> \".join(node.get(\"entity_id\", \"\") for node in chain)\n            return f\"I traced the connected flow as {chain_ids}.\"\n        if not records and not sql_result.get(\"rows\"):\n            return \"I could not find matching records in the dataset for that question.\"\n        sample_ids = \", \".join(str(record.get(\"entity_id\", \"\")) for record in records[:5])\n        return f\"I found {len(records)} graph matches for your question. Sample IDs: {sample_ids}.\"\n\n    def _tokenize(self, text: str) -> list[str]:\n        tokens = re.findall(r\"\\S+\\s*\", text)\n        return tokens or [text]\n\n    def _collect_relevant_node_ids(self, graph_result: dict[str, Any] | None) -> list[str]:\n        if graph_result is None:\n            return []\n        collected: set[str] = set()\n\n        def walk(value: Any) -> None:\n            if isinstance(value, dict):\n                for key in (\"node_id\", \"entity_id\", \"start_node_id\"):\n                    if key in value and value[key]:\n                        collected.add(str(value[key]))\n                for nested in value.values():\n                    walk(nested)\n            elif isinstance(value, list):\n                for item in value:\n                    walk(item)\n\n        walk(graph_result)\n        return sorted(collected)\n\n    def _append_log(self, *, stage: str, question: str, prompt: str, response: str, notes: str) -> None:\n        timestamp = datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + \"Z\"\n        entry = (\n            f\"\\n\\n## {timestamp} | {stage}\\n\"\n            f\"- Question: {question}\\n\"\n            f\"- Notes: {notes}\\n\\n\"\n            \"### Prompt\\n\"\n            f\"```text\\n{prompt}\\n```\\n\\n\"\n            \"### Response\\n\"\n            f\"```text\\n{response}\\n```\\n\"\n        )\n        with open(LOG_PATH, \"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as handle:\n            handle.write(entry)\n'@ | Set-Content backend\\agents\\query_pipeline.py",

No markdown, no commentary.\"\n            try:\n                response = await call_gemini(active_prompt, system_instruction)\n                parsed = self._parse_translation_payload(response, question)\n                self._append_log(stage=f\"translation-llm-attempt-{attempt + 1}\", question=question, prompt=active_prompt, response=response, notes=\"Translation successful.\")\n                return parsed\n            except Exception as exc:\n                self._append_log(stage=f\"translation-llm-attempt-{attempt + 1}\", question=question, prompt=active_prompt, response=str(exc), response=fallback.model_dump_json(indent=2), notes=\"LLM translation failed; deterministic fallback used.\")\n        return fallback\n\n    def _parse_translation_payload(self, response: str, question: str) -> TranslationPayload:\n        match = re.search(r\"\\{.*\\}\", response, re.DOTALL)\n        if not match:\n            raise ValueError(\"No JSON object found in translator response\")\n        payload = json.loads(match.group(0))\n        graph_operation = GraphOperation.model_validate(payload.get(\"graph_operation\") or payload)\n        normalized = str(payload.get(\"explanation\") or \"\").strip() or \"Generated graph traversal and SQL translation for the dataset query.\"\n        parsed = TranslationPayload(graph_operation=normalized, sql_query=sql_query, explanation=explanation)\n        self._append_log(stage=\"translation-refinement\", question=question, prompt=\"Normalized translation payload prepared for execution.\", response=parsed.model_dump_json(indent=2), notes=\"Structured graph operation and SQL query accepted.\")\n        return parsed\n\n    def _normalize_graph_operation(self, operation: GraphOperation) -> GraphOperation:\n        entity = ENTITY_ALIASES.get((operation.entity or \"\").lower(), operation.entity)\n        traverse_to = ENTITY_ALIASES.get((operation.traverse_to or \"\").lower(), operation.traverse_to)\n        filters = {FIELD_ALIASES.get(key, key): value for key, value in operation.filters.items()}\n        aggregation_field = FIELD_ALIASES.get(operation.aggregation_field or \"\", operation.aggregation_field)\n        return GraphOperation(operation=operation.operation, entity=entity, filters=filters, traverse_to=traverse_to, depth=operation.depth, aggregation=operation.aggregation, aggregation_field=aggregation_field, reason=operation.reason)\n\n    def _mock_translate(self, question: str, memory: ConversationMemory | None) -> and any(token in lowered for token in {\"these\", \"their\", \"them\", \"first one\", \"first\"}):\n            recent_entities = memory.get_last_entities()\n            if recent_entities:\n                entity = recent_entities[0][\"entity_type\"]\n                record_id = recent_entities[0][\"entity_id\"]\n\n        if any(term in lowered for term in [\"chain\", \"flow\", \"trace\", \"full path\"]):\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(operation=\"chain\", entity=entity or self._entity_from_id(record_id) or \"Invoice\", filters={\"id\": record_id} if record_id else {}, depth=4)\n        elif any(term in lowered for term in [\"highest\", \"most\", \"top\"]):\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(operation=\"aggregate\", entity=entity or \"Product\", filters={}, aggregation=\"max\", aggregation_field=\"invoices\")\n        elif \"count\" in lowered or lowered.startswith(\"how many\"):\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(operation=\"count\", entity=entity or \"Order\", filters={\"id\": record_id} if record_id else {})\n        elif any(term in lowered for term in [\"linked\", \"connected\", \"deliveries\", \"invoices\", \"payments\"]):\n            traverse_to = \"Delivery\" if \"deliver\" in lowered else \"Invoice\" if \"invoice\" in lowered or \"billing\" in lowered else \"Payment\" if \"payment\" in lowered or \"journal\" in lowered else None\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(operation=\"traverse\", entity=entity or self._entity_from_id(record_id) or \"Order\", filters={\"id\": record_id} if record_id else {}, traverse_to=traverse_to, depth=2)\n        elif record_id:\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(operation=\"find_node\", entity=self._entity_from_id(record_id) or entity or \"Order\", filters={\"id\": record_id})\n        else:\n            graph_operation = GraphOperation(operation=\"find_node\", entity=entity or \"Order\", filters={})\n\n        graph_operation = self._normalize_graph_operation(graph_operation)\n        sql_query = self._build_sql_from_graph_operation(graph_operation)\n        explanation = \"This translates the request into a graph traversal and an equivalent SQL query over the normalized in-memory SQLite tables.\"\n        return TranslationPayload(graph_operation=graph_operation, sql_query=sql_query, explanation=explanation)\n\n    def _detect_entity(self, question: str) -> str | None:\n        lowered = question.lower()\n        for key, value in ENTITY_ALIASES.items():\n 8:\n            return \"Delivery\"\n        if value.startswith((\"90\", \"91\")) and len(value) == 8:\n            return \"Invoice\"\n        if value.startswith(\"94\") and len(value) == 10:\n            return \"Payment\"\n        if value.startswith(\"32\") and len(value) == 9:\n            return \"Customer\"\n        return None\n\n    def _get_sql_schema_prompt(self) -> str:\n        return \"\\n\".join(f\"- {table}: columns [{', '.join(columns)}]\" for table, columns in self.sql_engine.get_schema_overview().items())\n\n    def _build_generated_query(self, translation: TranslationPayload) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        graph_query_string = self._format_graph_query_string(translation.graph_operation)\n        sql_query = translation.sql_query.strip() or self._build_sql_from_graph_operation(translation.graph_operation)\n        return {\n            \"type\": \"graph_traversal\",\n            \"query_string\": sql_query,\n            \"structured_form\": translation.model_dump(mode=\"json\"),\n            \"explanation\": translation.explanation,\n            \"sql_query\": sql_query,\n            \"graph_query_string\": graph_query_string,\n        }\n\n    def _format_graph_query_string(self, query: GraphOperation) -> str:\n        filters = \", \".join(f\"{key}={value}\" for key, value in query.filters.items()) or \"all\"\n        if query.operation == \"chain\":\n            return f\"find_node({query.entity}, {filters}) -> chain(Order -> Delivery -> Invoice -> Payment)\"\n        if query.operation == \"traverse\":\n            return f\"find_node({query.entity}, {filters}) -> traverse({query.traverse_to}, depth={query.depth or 1})\"\n        if query.operation == \"aggregate\":\n            return f\"aggregate({query.entity}, field={query.aggregation_field}, op={query.aggregation})\"\n        if query.operation == \"count\":\n            return f\"count({query.entity}, {filters})\"\n        return f\"find_node({query.entity}, {filters})\"\n'@ | Add-Content backend\\agents\\query_pipeline.py",

{
  "command": "@'\n\n    def _sql_literal(self, value: Any) -> str:\n        return f\"'{str(value).replace(\"'\", \"''\")}'\"\n\n    def _build_where_clause(self, alias: str, filters: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n        clauses = [f\"{alias}.{FIELD_ALIASES.get(key, key)} = {self._sql_literal(value)}\" for key, value in filters.items()]\n        return \" AND \".join(clauses) if clauses else \"1=1\"\n\n    def _build_sql_from_graph_operation(self, query: GraphOperation) -> str:\n        entity = query.entity or \"Order\"\n        table = ENTITY_TABLES.get(entity, \"orders\")\n        alias = table[0]\n        where_clause = self._build_where_clause(alias, query.filters)\n        if query.operation in {\"find_node\", \"filter\"}:\n            return f\"SELECT {alias}.* FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause} LIMIT 50\"\n        if query.operation == \"count\":\n            return f\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause}\"\n        if query.operation == \"aggregate\":\n            if entity == \"Product\" and (query.aggregation_field or \"\").lower() in {\"invoice\", \"invoices\", \"billing\", \"billing_documents\"}:\n                return \"SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT ip.invoice_id) AS value FROM products p LEFT JOIN invoice_products ip ON ip.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 50\"\n            field = FIELD_ALIASES.get(query.aggregation_field or \"amount\", query.aggregation_field or \"amount\")\n            aggregation = (query.aggregation or \"count\").upper()\n            if aggregation == \"COUNT\":\n                return f\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM {table} {alias} WHERE {where_clause}\"\n            return f\"SELECT {alias}.id, {aggregation}(CAST({alias}.{field} return handler(query) if handler is not None else {\"operation\": query.operation, \"records\": [], \"path_edges\": [], \"error\": \"Unsupported operation\"}\n\n    def _matching_nodes(self, entity: str | None, filters: dict[str, Any]) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]]:\n        matches = []\n        target_type = entity.lower() if entity else None\n        for node_key, attrs in self.builder.graph.nodes(data=True):\n            if target_type and attrs.get(\"entity_type\") != target_type:\n                continue\n            if self._matches_filters(attrs, filters):\n                matches.append((node_key, dict(attrs)))\n        return matches\n\n    def _matches_filters(self, attrs: dict[str, Any], filters: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:\n        if not filters:\n            return True\n        metadata = attrs.get(\"metadata\") if isinstance(attrs.get(\"metadata\"), dict) else {}\n        for field, expected in filters.items():\n            normalized_field = FIELD_ALIASES.get(field, field)\n            actual = attrs.get(\"entity_id\") if normalized_field == \"id\" else attrs.get(normalized_field, metadata.get(normalized_field, metadata.get(field)))\n            if actual is None:\n                return False\n            expected_str = str(expected).lower()\n            if isinstance(actual, list):\n                if not any(expected_str in str(item).lower() for item in actual):\n                    return False\n            elif expected_str not in str(actual).lower():\n                return False\n        return True\n\n    def _edge_payload(self, source: str, target: str, key: str, attrs: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        return {\"edge_id\": key, \"source\": source, \"target\": target, \"relationship\": key found, using mock mode\")\n            return answer\n        prompt, system_instruction = self._build_answer_prompt(question, translation, raw_data)\n        try:\n            response = await call_gemini(prompt, system_instruction)\n            self._append_log(stage=\"answer-llm\", question=question, prompt=prompt, response=response, notes=\"Answer generated from graph and SQL results.\")\n            return response\n        except Exception as exc:\n            answer = self._mock_answer(question, translation, raw_data)\n            self._append_log(stage=\"answer-llm-fallback\", question=question, prompt=prompt, response=answer, notes=f\"Gemini failed, fallback used: {exc}\")\n            return answer\n\n    async def _generate_answer_stream(self, question: str, translation: TranslationPayload, raw_data: dict[str, Any]) -> AsyncIterator[str]:\n        if not is_gemini_available():\n            answer = self._mock_answer(question, translation, raw_data)\n            for token in self._tokenize(answer):\n                yield token\n                await asyncio.sleep(0.02)\n            self._append_log(stage=\"answer-stream-mock\", question=question, prompt=\"Mock answer stream used\", response=answer, notes=\"No Gemini API key found, using mock streaming mode.\")\n            return\n        prompt, system_instruction = self._build_answer_prompt(question, translation, raw_data)\n        chunks: list[str] = []\n        try:\n            async for token in stream_gemini(prompt, system_instruction):\n                chunks.append(token)\n                yield token\n            self._append_log(stage=\"answer-stream-llm\", question=question, prompt=prompt, response=\"\".join(chunks), notes=\"Streaming answer generated from graph and SQL results.\")\n        except Exception as exc:\n            answer = self._mock_answer(question, translation, raw_data)\n            for token in self._tokenize(answer):\n                yield token\n                await asyncio.sleep(0.02)\n            self._append_log(stage=\"answer-stream-fallback\", question=question, prompt=prompt, response=answer, notes=f\"Streaming Gemini failed, fallback used: {exc}\")\n\n    def _build_answer_prompt(self, question: str, translation: TranslationPayload, raw_data: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, str]:\n        truncated = json.dumps(raw_data, indent=2, default=str)[:12000]\n        system_instruction = \"ROLE: You are a data analyst presenting query results.\"\n        prompt = (\n            f\"CONTEXT:\\n{truncated}\\n\\nQUESTION: {question}\\nGENERATED QUERY: {translation.model_dump_json(indent=2)}\\n\\n\"\n            \"TASK: Answer the user's question based ONLY on this data. Do not make up information.\\n\"\n            \"FORMAT: Respond with a clear natural language paragraph. If the data is tabular, include a brief summary.\"\n        )\n        return prompt, system_instruction\n\n    def _mock_answer(self, question: str, translation: TranslationPayload, raw_data: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n        graph_result = raw_data.get(\"graph_result\", {})\n        records = graph_result.get(\"records\", []) if isinstance(graph_result, dict) else []\n        if translation.graph_operation.operation == \"count\":\n            count = graph_result.get(\"count\", len(records))\n            return f\"I found {count} matching {translation.graph_operation.entity or 'records'} in the graph and validated the count against the SQLite tables.\"\n        if translation.graph_operation.operation == \"aggregate\" and records:\n            top = records[0]\n            return f\"The top matching {translation.graph_operation.entity or 'record'} is {top.get('entity_id')} with value {top.get('value')}.\"\n        if translation.graph_operation.operation == \"chain\" and records:\n            chain_ids = \" -> \".join(node.get(\"entity_id\", \"\") for node in records[0][\"chain\"])\n            return f\"I traced the connected flow as {chain_ids}.\"\n        if not records:\n            return \"I could not find matching records in the dataset for that question.\"\n        sample_ids = \", \".join(str(record.get(\"entity_id\", \"\")) for record in records[:5])\n        return f\"I found {len(records)} graph matches for your question. Sample IDs: {sample_ids}.\"\n\n    def _tokenize(self, text: str) -> list[str]:\n        tokens = re.findall(r\"\\S+\\s*\", text)\n        return tokens or [text]\n\n    def _collect_relevant_node_ids(self, graph_result: dict[str, Any] | None) -> list[str]:\n        if graph_result is None:\n            return []\n        collected: set[str] = set()\n        def walk(value: Any) -> None:\n            if isinstance(value, dict):\n                for key in (\"node_id\", \"entity_id\", \"start_node_id\"):\n                    if key in value and value[key]:\n                        collected.add(str(value[key]))\n                for nested in value.values():\n                    walk(nested)\n            elif isinstance(value, list):\n                for item in value:\n                    walk(item)\n        walk(graph_result)\n        return sorted(collected)\n\n    def _append_log(self, *, stage: str, question: str, prompt: str, response: str, notes: str) -> None:\n        timestamp = datetime.utcnow().isoformat() + \"Z\"\n        entry = f\"\\n\\n## {timestamp} | {stage}\\n- Question: {question}\\n- Notes: {notes}\\n\\n### Prompt\\n```text\\n{prompt}\\n```\\n\\n### Response\\n```text\\n{response}\\n```\\n\"\n        with open(LOG_PATH, \"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as handle:\n            handle.write(entry)\n'@ | Add-Content backend\\agents\\query_pipeline.py",

StreamingResponse\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel\n\nfrom backend.agents.memory import clear_session_memory, get_session_memory\nfrom backend.agents.query_pipeline import QueryPipeline\nfrom backend.services.graph_store import graph_store\n\nrouter = APIRouter(prefix=\"/api\", tags=[\"query\"])\n\n\nclass QueryRequest(BaseModel):\n    question: str\n    session_id: str | None = None\n\n\ndef _resolve_session_id(body_session_id: str | None, header_session_id: str | None) -> str:\n    return header_session_id or body_session_id or str(uuid4())\n\n\ndef _sse(event: str, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n    return f\"event: {event}\\ndata: {json.dumps(payload)}\\n\\n\"\n\n\n@router.post(\"/query\")\nasync def query_graph(request: QueryRequest, x_session_id: str | None = Header(default=None)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    session_id = _resolve_session_id(request.session_id, x_session_id)\n    pipeline = QueryPipeline(graph_store.graph, graph_store.sql_engine)\n    memory = get_session_memory(session_id)\n    payload = await pipeline.run(request.question, memory=memory)\n    payload[\"session_id\"] = session_id\n    return payload\n\n\n@router.post(\"/query/stream\")\nasync def stream_query_graph(request: QueryRequest, x_session_id: str | None = Header(default=None)) -> StreamingResponse:\n    session_id = _resolve_session_id(request.session_id, x_session_id)\n    pipeline = QueryPipeline(graph_store.graph, graph_store.sql_engine)\n    memory = get_session_memory(session_id)\n\n    async def event_stream():\n        yield _sse(\"status\", {\"stage\": \"session\", \"message\": \"Session ready\", \"session_id\": session_id})\n        async for event, payload in pipeline.stream(request.question, memory=memory):\n            payload.setdefault(\"session_id\", session_id)\n            yield _sse(event, payload)\n\n    return StreamingResponse(event_stream(), media_type=\"text/event-stream\")\n\n\n@router.delete(\"/session/{session_id}\", status_code=204)\ndef clear_session(session_id: str) -> Response:\n    clear_session_memory(session_id)\n    return Any]]]:\n    if limit is None or limit <= 0 or len(payload[\"nodes\"]) <= limit:\n        return payload\n    nodes = payload[\"nodes\"][:limit]\n    allowed_ids = {node[\"data\"][\"id\"] for node in nodes}\n    edges = [edge for edge in payload[\"edges\"] if edge[\"data\"][\"source\"] in allowed_ids and edge[\"data\"][\"target\"] in allowed_ids]\n    return {\"nodes\": nodes, \"edges\": edges}\n\n\ndef _analysis() -> GraphAnalysisService:\n    return GraphAnalysisService(graph_store.graph)\n\n\n@router.get(\"/graph\")\ndef get_graph(limit: int | None = Query(default=None, ge=1)) -> _analysis().get_clusters()}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/graph/importance\")\ndef get_graph_importance(limit: int = Query(default=25, ge=1, le=200)) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return {\"nodes\": _analysis().get_node_importance(limit=limit)}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/graph/broken-flows\")\ndef get_graph_broken_flows() -> dict[str, Any]:\n    return _analysis().get_broken_flows()\n\n\n@router.get(\"/node/{node_id}\")\ndef get_node(node_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    node = graph_store.graph.get_node(node_id)\n    if node is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f\"Node '{node_id}' not found\")\n    return {\"node\": node, \"neighbors\": graph_store.graph.get_neighbors(node_id)}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/node/{node_id}/subgraph\")\ndef get_node_subgraph(node_id: str, depth: int = Query(default=2, ge=1, le=10)) -> dict[str, list[dict[str, Any]]]:\n    node = graph_store.graph.get_node(node_id)\n    if node is None:\n        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f\"Node '{node_id}' not found\")\n    return graph_store.graph.serialize_graph(graph_store.graph.get_subgraph(node_id, depth))\n\n\n@router.post(\"/graph/node\", status_code=201)\ndef create_graph_node(request: NodeCreateRequest) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    logger.info(\"Adding node %s of type %s\", request.id, request.type)\n    return {\"node\": graph_store.graph.add_node(request.id, request.type, request.metadata)}\n\n\n@router.post(\"/graph/edge\", status_code=201)\ndef create_graph_edge(request: EdgeCreateRequest) -> dict[str, Any]:\n    logger.info(\"Adding edge %s -> %s (%s)\", request.source, request.target, request.relationship)\n    return {\"edge\": graph_store.graph.add_edge(request.source, request.target, request.relationship)}\n\n\n@router.delete(\"/graph/reset\")\ndef reset_graph() -> dict[str, Any]:\n    logger.info(\"Resetting graph from original dataset\")\n    builder = graph_store.reset()\n    return {\"message\": \"Graph rebuilt from source data\", \"stats\": builder.get_stats()}\n\n\n@router.get(\"/graph/export\")\ndef export_graph() -> JSONResponse:\n    return JSONResponse(content=graph_store.graph.to_json(), headers={\"Content-Disposition\": 'attachment; filename=\"sap-o2c-graph.json\"'})\n'@ | Set-Content backend\\routes\\graph.py",
  "workdir": "c:\\Projects\\DodgeAI-Assignment",
  "timeout_ms": 120000
}

response = await api.get<GraphPayload>(\"/api/graph\", {\n    params: limit ? { limit } : undefined,\n  });\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function fetchGraphStats(): Promise<GraphStats> {\n  const response = await api.get<GraphStats>(\"/api/graph/stats\");\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function fetchNode(nodeId: string): Promise<NodeDetailResponse> {\n  const response = await api.get<GraphPayload>(`/api/node/${nodeId}/subgraph`, {\n    params: { depth },\n  });\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function addGraphNode(payload: AddNodePayload) {\n  const response = await api.post(\"/api/graph/node\", payload);\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function addGraphEdge(payload: AddEdgePayload) {\n  const response = await api.post(\"/api/graph/edge\", payload);\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function resetGraph() {\n  const response = await api.delete(\"/api/graph/reset\");\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function exportGraphJson(): Promise<Blob> {\n  const response = await api.get(\"/api/graph/export\", {\n    responseType: \"blob\",\n  });\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function fetchClusters(): Promise<ClusterResponse> {\n  const response = await api.get<ClusterResponse>(\"/api/graph/clusters\");\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function fetchImportance(limit = 25): Promise<ImportanceResponse> {\n  const response = await api.get<ImportanceResponse>(\"/api/graph/importance\", {\n    params: { limit },\n  });\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function fetchBrokenFlows(): Promise<BrokenFlowsResponse> {\n  const response = await api.get<BrokenFlowsResponse>(\"/api/graph/broken-flows\");\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport async function clearSession(sessionId: string) {\n  await api.delete(`/api/session/${sessionId}`);\n}\n\nexport async function queryGraph(question: string, sessionId: string): Promise<QueryResponse> {\n  const response = await api.post<QueryResponse>(\"/api/query\", { question, session_id: sessionId }, {\n    headers: { \"X-Session-Id\": sessionId },\n  });\n  return response.data;\n}\n\nexport interface StreamHandlers {\n  onStatus?: (payload: Record<string, unknown>) => void;\n  onQuery?: (payload: Record<string, unknown>) => void;\n  onToken?: (payload: Record<string, unknown>) => void;\n  onComplete?: (payload: QueryResponse) => void;\n}\n\nfunction parseSseChunk(chunk: string, emit: (eventName: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>) => void) {\n  const events = chunk.split(\"\\n\\n\").filter(Boolean);\n  for (const eventBlock of events) {\n    const lines = eventBlock.split(\"\\n\");\n    const eventLine = lines.find((line) => line.startsWith(\"event:\"));\n    const dataLine = lines.find((line) => line.startsWith(\"data:\"));\n    if (!eventLine || !dataLine) {\n      continue;\n    }\n    const eventName = eventLine.replace(\"event:\", \"\").trim();\n    const dataText = dataLine.replace(\"data:\", \"\").trim();\n    try {\n      emit(eventName, JSON.parse(dataText) as Record<string, unknown>);\n    } catch {\n      emit(eventName, { text: dataText });\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function streamGraphQuery(question: string, sessionId: string, handlers: StreamHandlers): Promise<void> {\n  const response = await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/query/stream`, {\n    method: \"POST\",\n    headers: {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      \"X-Session-Id\": sessionId,\n    },\n    body: JSON.stringify({ question, session_id: sessionId }),\n  });\n\n  if (!response.ok || !response.body) {\n    throw new Error(\"Streaming request failed.\");\n  }\n\n  const reader = response.body.getReader();\n  const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n  let buffer = \"\";\n\n  while (true) {\n    const { done, value } = await reader.read();\n    if (done) {\n      break;\n    }\n    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });\n    const parts = buffer.split(\"\\n\\n\");\n    buffer = parts.pop() ?? \"\";\n    for (const part of parts) {\n      parseSseChunk(`${part}\\n\\n`, (eventName, payload) => {\n        if (eventName === \"status\") {\n          handlers.onStatus?.(payload);\n        } else if (eventName === \"query\") {\n          handlers.onQuery?.(payload);\n        } else if (eventName === \"token\") {\n          handlers.onToken?.(payload);\n        } else if (eventName === \"complete\") {\n          handlers.onComplete?.(payload as unknown as QueryResponse);\n        }\n      });\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport { api };\n'@ | Set-Content frontend\\src\\services\\api.ts",

{
  "command": "@'\nimport { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\n\nimport { clearSession, queryGraph, streamGraphQuery } from \"../services/api\";\nimport type { ChatMessage, GeneratedQuery, QueryMemory, QueryResponse } from \"../types/api\";\n\ninterface ChatPanelProps {\n  highlightedNodes: string[];\n  onApplyQueryFocus: (payload: { edgeIds: string[]; nodeIds: string[]; primaryNodeId: string | null; reasons: Record<string, string> }) => void;\n  onClearHighlights: () => void;\n  onResetConversationView: () => void;\n  onStatusChange: (message: string) => void;\n  scrollToNodeId: string | null;\n}\n\nfunction createMessageId() {\n  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\n}\n\nfunction createSessionId() {\n  return typeof crypto !== \"undefined\" && \"randomUUID\" in crypto ? crypto.randomUUID() : createMessageId();\n}\n\nfunction normalizeId(value: string) {\n  const parts = value.split(\":\");\n  return parts[parts.length - 1] ?? value;\n}\n\nfunction pickPrimaryNodeId(question: string, relevantNodeIds: string[] | undefined): string | null {\n  const idsInQuestion = question.match(/[A-Za-z]?\\d{6,10}/g) ?? [];\n  const normalizedRelevant = (relevantNodeIds ?? []).filter(Boolean);\n  for (const candidate of idsInQuestion) {\n    const exactMatch = normalizedRelevant.find((value) => normalizeId(value) === candidate || value === candidate);\n    if (exactMatch) {\n      return exactMatch;\n    }\n  }\n  return normalizedRelevant[0] ?? null;\n}\n\nfunction buildHighlightReasons(nodeIds: string[], question: string): Record<string, string> {\n  const questionId = question.match(/[A-Za-z]?\\d{6,10}/)?.[0];\n  return Object.fromEntries(nodeIds.map((nodeId) => [nodeId, questionId ? `Matched: ${questionId}` : \"Matched result\"]));\n}\n\nfunction highlightSql(sql: string) {\n  const keywords = /\\b(SELECT|FROM|JOIN|LEFT|RIGHT|INNER|OUTER|WHERE|GROUP BY|ORDER BY|LIMIT|AS|ON|COUNT|DISTINCT|AND|OR|WITH)\\b/gi;\n  const parts = sql.split(keywords);\n  return parts.map((part, index) => {\n    if (part.match(keywords)) {\n      return <span key={`${part}-${index}`} className=\"font-semibold text-sky-700\">{part}</span>;\n    }\n    return <span key={`${part}-${index}`} className=\"text-slate-700\">{part}</span>;\n  });\n}\n\nexport function ChatPanel({ highlightedNodes, onApplyQueryFocus, onClearHighlights, onResetConversationView, onStatusChange, scrollToNodeId }: ChatPanelProps) {\n  const [input, setInput] = useState(\"\");\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([{ id: createMessageId(), role: \"assistant\", text: \"Hi! I can help you analyze the Order to Cash process.\" }]);\n  const [isThinking, setIsThinking] = useState(false);\n  const [streamingStage, setStreamingStage] = useState<string>(\"Ready\");\n  const [sessionId, setSessionId] = useState(createSessionId);\n  const [memory, setMemory] = useState<QueryMemory | null>(null);\n  const [expandedQueries, setExpandedQueries] = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});\n  const messageRefs = useRef<Record<string, HTMLDivElement | null>>({});\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (!scrollToNodeId) {\n      return;\n    }\n    const targetMessage = [...messages].reverse().find((message) => message.relevantNodeIds?.some((nodeId) => normalizeId(nodeId) === normalizeId(scrollToNodeId)));\n    if (targetMessage) {\n      messageRefs.current[targetMessage.id]?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: \"smooth\", block: \"center\" });\n    }\n  }, [messages, scrollToNodeId]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleKeyDown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {\n      if (event.key === \"Escape\") {\n        setInput(\"\");\n      }\n    };\n    window.addEventListener(\"keydown\", handleKeyDown);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener(\"keydown\", handleKeyDown);\n  }, []);\n\n  const activeHighlightCount = useMemo(() => highlightedNodes.length, [highlightedNodes.length]);\n\n  const applyResponse = (question: string, response: QueryResponse, assistantMessageId: string) => {\n    const primaryNodeId = pickPrimaryNodeId(question, response.relevant_node_ids);\n    const edgeIds = response.raw_data?.graph_result?.path_edges?.map((edge) => edge.edge_id) ?? [];\n    const nodeIds = response.relevant_node_ids ?? [];\n    onApplyQueryFocus({ edgeIds, nodeIds, primaryNodeId, reasons: buildHighlightReasons(nodeIds, question) });\n    onStatusChange(primaryNodeId ? `Focused graph on ${normalizeId(primaryNodeId)}.` : \"Query completed.\");\n    setMessages((current) => current.map((message) => message.id === assistantMessageId ? {\n      ...message,\n      text: response.answer,\n      relevantNodeIds: response.relevant_node_ids,\n      relevantEdgeIds: edgeIds,\n      rawData: response.raw_data,\n      generatedQuery: response.generated_query,\n      executionTimeMs: response.execution_time_ms,\n      rejected: response.answer.includes(\"designed to answer questions related to the dataset only\"),\n    } : message));\n    setMemory(response.memory ?? null);\n    setSessionId(response.session_id || sessionId);\n  };\n\n  const handleSend = async () => {\n    const question = input.trim();\n    if (!question || isThinking) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const userMessage: ChatMessage = { id: createMessageId(), role: \"user\", text: question };\n    const assistantMessageId = createMessageId();\n    const placeholderMessage: ChatMessage = { id: assistantMessageId, role: \"assistant\", text: \"\", generatedQuery: null };\n\n    setMessages((current) => [...current, userMessage, placeholderMessage]);\n    setInput(\"\");\n    setIsThinking(true);\n    setStreamingStage(\"Checking query relevance...\");\n    onClearHighlights();\n\n    try {\n      let streamedQuery: GeneratedQuery | null = null;\n      let streamedText = \"\";\n      await streamGraphQuery(question, sessionId, {\n        onStatus: (payload) => {\n          const message = typeof payload.message === \"string\" ? payload.message : \"Working...\";\n          setStreamingStage(message);\n        },\n        onQuery: (payload) => {\n          streamedQuery = (payload.generated_query as GeneratedQuery | undefined) ?? null;\n          setMessages((current) => current.map((message) => message.id === assistantMessageId ? { ...message, generatedQuery: streamedQuery } : message));\n        },\n        onToken: (payload) => {\n          const token = typeof payload.text === \"string\" ? payload.text : \"\";\n          streamedText += token;\n          setMessages((current) => current.map((message) => message.id === assistantMessageId ? { ...message, text: streamedText } : message));\n        },\n        onComplete: (payload) => {\n          applyResponse(question, payload, assistantMessageId);\n        },\n      });\n    } catch {\n      setStreamingStage(\"Streaming unavailable. Falling back...\");\n      const response = await queryGraph(question, sessionId);\n      applyResponse(question, response, assistantMessageId);\n    } finally {\n      setIsThinking(false);\n      setStreamingStage(\"Ready\");\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleNewConversation = async () => {\n    await clearSession(sessionId);\n    setSessionId(createSessionId());\n    setMemory(null);\n    setMessages([{ id: createMessageId(), role: \"assistant\", text: \"Starting a fresh conversation. Ask me about the graph.\" }]);\n    setExpandedQueries({});\n    onResetConversationView();\n    onStatusChange(\"Started a new conversation.\");\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <aside className=\"ml-4 flex w-[430px] shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-[22px] border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm\">\n      <div className=\"flex h-full min-h-0 w-full flex-col\">\n        <div className=\"border-b border-slate-200 px-5 py-4\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-start justify-between gap-3\">\n            <div>\n              <h2 className=\"text-[18px] font-semibold text-slate-950\">Chat with Graph</h2>\n              <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-slate-500\">Order to Cash</p>\n            </div>\n            <button className=\"rounded-xl border border-slate-200 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600 transition hover:bg-slate-50\" onClick={() => void handleNewConversation()} type=\"button\">New Conversation</button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"border-b border-slate-100 px-5 py-5\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-start gap-4\">\n            <div className=\"flex size-12 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-slate-950 text-lg font-semibold text-white\">D</div>\n            <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-[18px] font-semibold text-slate-950\">Dodge AI</h3>\n              <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-500\">Graph Agent</p>\n              <p className=\"mt-2 text-xs text-slate-400\">Memory: {memory?.turn_count ?? 0}/{memory?.max_turns ?? 10} turns</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 space-y-4 overflow-auto px-5 py-5\">\n          {messages.map((message) => (\n            <div key={message.id} ref={(element) => { messageRefs.current[message.id] = element; }} className=\"space-y-3 rounded-2xl border border-transparent p-1\">\n              <div className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-[15px] leading-7 ${message.role === \"user\" ? \"ml-8 bg-slate-950 text-white\" : message.rejected ? \"bg-amber-50 text-amber-800\" : \"bg-slate-50 text-slate-900\"}`}>\n                {message.text || (isThinking && message.id === messages[messages.length - 1]?.id ? \"...\" : \"\")}\n              </div>\n              {message.generatedQuery ? (\n                <div className=\"rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-3\">\n                  <button className=\"flex w-full items-center justify-between text-left text-sm font-medium text-slate-700\" onClick={() => setExpandedQueries((current) => ({ ...current, [message.id]: !current[message.id] }))} type=\"button\">\n                    <span>{expandedQueries[message.id] ? \"▼\" : \"▶\"} View Generated Query</span>\n                    {message.executionTimeMs ? <span className=\"text-xs text-slate-400\">{message.executionTimeMs}ms</span> : null}\n                  </button>\n                  {expandedQueries[message.id] ? (\n                    <div className=\"mt-3 space-y-3 rounded-2xl bg-slate-50 p-3 text-sm\">\n                      <div>\n                        <div className=\"mb-1 font-semibold text-slate-900\">SQL</div>\n                        <pre className=\"overflow-auto rounded-xl bg-white p-3 text-xs leading-6\">{highlightSql(message.generatedQuery.sql_query ?? message.generatedQuery.query_string)}</pre>\n                      </div>\n                      <div>\n                        <div className=\"mb-1 font-semibold text-slate-900\">Graph Traversal</div>\n                        <pre className=\"overflow-auto rounded-xl bg-white p-3 text-xs leading-6 text-slate-700\">{message.generatedQuery.graph_query_string ?? JSON.stringify(message.generatedQuery.structured_form, null, 2)}</pre>\n                      </div>\n                      <div className=\"text-xs leading-5 text-slate-500\">{message.generatedQuery.explanation}</div>\n                    </div>\n                  ) : null}\n                </div>\n              ) : null}\n              {message.relevantNodeIds?.length ? <div className=\"text-xs text-slate-500\">Highlighted {message.relevantNodeIds.length} related nodes.</div> : null}\n            </div>\n          ))}\n          {isThinking ? <div className=\"text-sm text-sky-600\">{streamingStage}<span className=\"ml-2 inline-block animate-pulse\">...</span></div> : null}\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"border-t border-slate-200 p-5\">\n          <div className=\"mb-3 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-emerald-100 bg-emerald-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-emerald-700\">\n            <span className=\"size-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500\" />\n            {isThinking ? useState<ModalMode>(null);\n  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [nodeForm, setNodeForm] = useState({ id: \"\", id: nodeForm.id, type: nodeForm.type, metadata: JSON.parse(nodeForm.metadata) });\n      closeModal();\n      onGraphChanged(`Added ${nodeForm.type} node ${nodeForm.id}.`);\n    } catch (submitError) {\n      setError(submitError instanceof Error ? submitError.message : \"Unable to add node\");\n    } finally {\n      setSubmitting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAddEdge = async () => {\n
